It supports multiple chart types (flowcharts, sequence diagrams, etc.), offers both standard and hand-drawn rendering modes, and includes features like code repair, optimization suggestions, file import, and local history for efficient diagram generation.

metadata.name: LiveWallpaperMacOS
metadata.description: This is a Opensource Live wallpaper solution for MacOS

summary.zh: 这是一个为 macOS 14+ 开发的开源动态壁纸应用，支持 .mp4 和 .mov 格式视频作为桌面背景。项目使用 Objective-C++ 与 SwiftUI 混合开发，提供多显示器支持与性能优化，可通过 Homebrew 安装或源码编译部署，需手动绕过 Gatekeeper 限制。
summary.en: An open-source live wallpaper application for macOS 14+, supporting .mp4 and .mov videos as dynamic desktop backgrounds. Built with a mix of Objective-C++ and SwiftUI, it offers multi-display support and performance optimization. Installable via Homebrew or source compilation, with manual Gatekeeper bypass required.

metadata.name: snippai
metadata.description: Snip Anything Solve Everything​

summary.zh: Snippai 是一款基于先进 AI 算法的智能截图工具，支持公式识别转 LaTeX、图像文本提取、表格转 Markdown、图像内容分析、代码理解、颜色检测及多语言实时翻译等功能，显著提升截图处理效率与生产力，适用于学习、办公与设计场景。
summary.en: Snippai is an AI-powered snipping tool that intelligently extracts and analyzes content from screenshots. It supports formula-to-LaTeX conversion, text and table extraction, image description, code explanation, color detection, and real-time multilingual translation, enhancing productivity across education, work, and design workflows.

metadata.name: ghostwriter
metadata.description: 影子作家（ghostwriter），一些人的写作或语言特征。

summary.zh: ghostwriter（影子作家）是一个开源项目，提供从文学作品、社交媒体、影视角色等来源提取的结构化语言特征数据，以 JSON 格式存储。每个文件包含特定人物的语言风格、思维模式和表达习惯，适用于大模型微调或风格模仿研究，支持长上下文模型实现更自然的文本生成。
summary.en: ghostwriter is an open-source project offering structured linguistic feature data extracted from literary works, social media, and fictional characters, stored in JSON format. Each file captures a person's language style, thought patterns, and expression habits, suitable for LLM fine-tuning or stylistic imitation research, enhancing text generation with long-context models.

metadata.name: weekly
metadata.description: 前端精读周刊。帮你理解最前沿、实用的技术。

summary.zh: 《前端精读周刊》是一个专注于前端技术深度解析的优质内容聚合项目，每周精选并解读前沿技术、源码实现、架构设计与工程实践。内容涵盖 React、V8、模块化、设计模式等核心领域，结合大厂经验提供实用指导，助力开发者提升技术深度与工程素养。
summary.en: Frontend Weekly is a curated collection of in-depth technical articles focused on modern frontend development. It offers weekly insights into cutting-edge technologies, source code analysis, architectural patterns, and best practices, drawing from real-world industry experience to help developers deepen their expertise.

metadata.name: weekly
metadata.description: 科技爱好者周刊，每周五发布

summary.zh: 《科技爱好者周刊》是阮一峰维护的每周科技资讯精选，涵盖AI、编程、创业、互联网趋势等前沿话题，内容深度与可读性兼具。每周五发布，提供免费投稿通道和程序员招聘专区，是中文技术圈高影响力的信息聚合平台。
summary.en: Tech Enthusiast Weekly, curated by Ruan Yifeng, delivers insightful tech content every Friday. It covers AI, programming, startups, and internet trends with depth and accessibility. Features open submissions and a popular free job board for developers, making it a key information hub in the Chinese tech community.

metadata.name: cursor-auto-free
metadata.description: auto sign cursor

summary.zh: cursor-auto-free 是一个用于自动注册 Cursor Pro 账号的自动化工具，支持批量操作与免手动验证流程。项目提供详细在线文档与社区支持，采用 CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 许可，仅限非商业用途。适用于开发者提升 AI 编程工具使用效率。
summary.en: cursor-auto-free is an automation tool for auto-signing up Cursor Pro accounts, supporting batch operations and bypassing manual verification. It includes comprehensive online documentation and community support, released under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 license for non-commercial use only.

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于多智能体与大型语言模型（LLM）的AI投资决策辅助系统，专为A股市场设计。通过多头/空头研究员协同分析、辩论室机制及LLM第三方评估，实现多角度市场解读。支持智能新闻搜索、多源数据整合与缓存优化，采用模块化架构提升决策客观性与扩展性，仅用于研究目的。
summary.en: This project is an AI-powered investment decision support system for China's A-share market, leveraging multi-agent collaboration and LLMs. It features bull/bear researchers, a debate room with LLM-based third-party evaluation, and intelligent news aggregation with caching. Designed for research, it emphasizes modularity, multi-perspective analysis, and objective decision-making.

metadata.name: ChinaTextbook
metadata.description: 所有小初高、大学PDF教材。

summary.zh: 该项目开源整理中国小初高及大学阶段的PDF教材资源，旨在打破教育资源垄断，促进教育公平，尤其帮助海外华人子女延续国内基础教育。内容涵盖人教版数学教材，按年级分册提供直接下载链接，推动知识共享与教育普惠。
summary.en: This project open-sources PDF textbooks from primary to university level in China, aiming to eliminate educational inequality and support overseas Chinese families in continuing domestic education. It provides direct access to grade-specific math textbooks, promoting open knowledge sharing and educational equity.

metadata.name: BongoCat
metadata.description: 🐱 跨平台互动桌宠 BongoCat，为桌面增添乐趣！

summary.zh: BongoCat 是一款跨平台桌面宠物应用，支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 系统。它以可爱的猫咪形象实时响应用户的键盘敲击和鼠标操作，为桌面增添趣味互动体验。基于 Tauri 框架构建，轻量高效，适合提升工作或娱乐时的氛围感。
summary.en: BongoCat is a cross-platform desktop pet application for Windows, macOS, and Linux. It features an adorable cat that reacts in real time to keyboard and mouse inputs, adding playful interactivity to your desktop. Built with Tauri, it's lightweight and perfect for enhancing your work or leisure environment.

summary.zh: Void 是一款开源的 Cursor 替代品，基于 VS Code 构建，支持在代码库中使用 AI 代理、检查点记录变更并可视化修改。它允许集成任意模型或本地部署，且数据直连提供商，不保留用户信息。目前项目已暂停维护以探索创新方向。
summary.en: Void is an open-source alternative to Cursor, built on VS Code, enabling AI agents on codebases with checkpointing and change visualization. It supports any model or local hosting, sending data directly to providers without retention. Development is currently paused for innovation exploration.

metadata.name: minimax-free-api
metadata.description: 🚀 MiniMax大模型海螺AI逆向API【特长：超自然语音】，支持MiniMax Text-01、MiniMax-VL-01模型，支持高速流式输出、语音合成、联网搜索、长文档解读、图像解析、多轮对话，零配置部署，多路token支持，自动清理会话痕迹，仅供测试，如需商用请前往官方开放平台。

summary.zh: 该项目为MiniMax海螺AI的逆向免费API服务，支持Text-01和VL-01模型，提供流式输出、语音合成与识别、联网搜索、图像解析、长文档解读及多轮对话功能。兼容ChatGPT接口，支持多Token轮询、零配置Docker部署，适用于个人测试与研究，严禁商用。
summary.en: This project provides a free reverse API for MiniMax Hailuo AI, supporting Text-01 and VL-01 models with features like streaming output, TTS/ASR, web search, image parsing, long-document analysis, and multi-turn dialogue. Fully compatible with ChatGPT API, it supports multi-token rotation and zero-config Docker deployment for personal testing only.

summary.zh: 魔法AI绘画是一个基于Next.js 14和TypeScript开发的AI图像生成应用，支持Sora、DALL-E 3、GPT、GEMINI等多种模型，提供文生图、图生图及区域编辑功能，所有数据本地存储保障隐私，支持跨平台使用。
summary.en: Magic Image is an AI-powered image generation app built with Next.js 14 and TypeScript, supporting multiple models like Sora, DALL-E 3, GPT, and GEMINI. It offers text-to-image, image-to-image, and region editing features, with all data stored locally for privacy and cross-platform compatibility.

metadata.name: WeChatReaderEnhancer
metadata.description: 公众号阅读增强插件是一款 Chrome 浏览器扩展，旨在提升用户阅读微信公众号文章的体验。通过自动生成文章的结构化目录，让您轻松了解文章结构、快速导航到感兴趣的部分，并在阅读长文时保持位置感知。

summary.zh: 公众号阅读增强插件是一款 Chrome 扩展，专为提升微信公众号文章阅读体验设计。核心功能包括自动生成结构化目录、图片放大预览、链接识别转换及阅读位置追踪，支持快速导航与界面定制，优化长文阅读效率。
summary.en: WeChat Reader Enhancer is a Chrome extension designed to improve the reading experience of WeChat Official Account articles. It offers auto-generated structured navigation, image zoom, link detection, scroll position tracking, and UI customization for efficient long-form reading.

metadata.name: Adobe-Downloader
metadata.description: macOS Adobe apps download & installer

summary.zh: Adobe Downloader 是一款专为 macOS 13.0+ 设计的 Adobe 官方应用下载与安装工具，支持多产品并行下载、自动处理 Setup 组件以解决安装错误（如2700），并提供全面的清理功能。所有应用均来自 Adobe 官方渠道，非破解版本，确保安全性与合规性。
summary.en: Adobe Downloader is a macOS 13.0+ tool for downloading and installing official Adobe apps. It supports parallel downloads, auto-modifies Setup components to fix installation errors (e.g., code 2700), and includes a full cleanup suite. All apps are sourced directly from Adobe, ensuring authenticity and security.

metadata.name: free-for-dev
metadata.description: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev

summary.zh: free-for-dev 是一个专为开发者和运维人员整理的免费云服务清单，涵盖 SaaS、PaaS 和 IaaS 等提供免费层级的平台。内容按功能分类，包括云厂商、CI/CD、监控、数据库、安全等，帮助开发者快速发现适合基础设施开发的免费资源。
summary.en: free-for-dev is a curated list of SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS offerings with free tiers, specifically targeting developers and DevOps practitioners. It categorizes services like cloud providers, CI/CD, monitoring, databases, and security to help users discover useful free infrastructure tools efficiently.

metadata.name: MoneyPrinterTurbo
metadata.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

summary.zh: MoneyPrinterTurbo 是一款基于 AI 大模型的自动化短视频生成工具，支持通过输入主题或关键词一键生成包含文案、素材、字幕、配音和背景音乐的高清视频。提供 Web 界面与 API 接口，兼容多种主流大模型（如 DeepSeek、通义千问等），支持横竖屏切换及批量生成，适用于内容创作者快速产出无版权短视频。
summary.en: MoneyPrinterTurbo is an AI-powered tool that automatically generates high-definition short videos from a single topic or keyword. It creates scripts, visuals, subtitles, voiceovers, and background music using large language models. With Web UI and API support, it integrates multiple LLMs (e.g., DeepSeek, Qwen) and enables batch generation in both vertical and horizontal formats for efficient, copyright-free content creation.

metadata.name: edit
metadata.description: Make changes to FMHY

summary.zh: FMHY 是一个致力于整理互联网上免费资源的开源项目，提供网站、工具和内容的集中索引。通过 GitHub Wiki 和官网 fmhy.net 同步更新，支持社区贡献与 API 访问，涵盖存储链接、第三方索引及用户推荐，是目前最大的免费资源集合之一。
summary.en: FMHY is an open-source project curating the largest collection of free internet resources, including websites, tools, and content. It syncs updates via GitHub Wiki and fmhy.net, supports community contributions, and offers API access with categorized links like storage, third-party indexes, and user recommendations.

metadata.name: MusicFreeDesktop
metadata.description: 插件化、定制化、无广告的免费音乐播放器

summary.zh: MusicFree 桌面版是一款基于插件架构的免费音乐播放器，支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux。其核心特性包括插件化音源扩展、深度界面定制（支持 CSS 变量与 iframe 背景）、完全无广告及本地数据存储，保障用户隐私。通过社区开发的插件可接入任意在线音乐平台。
summary.en: MusicFree Desktop is a free, plugin-based music player for Windows, macOS, and Linux. It features modular audio source integration via plugins, deep UI customization using CSS variables and iframe backgrounds, zero ads, and local-only data storage to ensure user privacy. Users can access any online music platform through community-developed plugins.

metadata.name: MusicFree
metadata.description: 插件化、定制化、无广告的免费音乐播放器

summary.zh: MusicFree 是一款基于插件架构的免费音乐播放器，支持 Android 与 Harmony OS。其核心特性包括完全插件化的音源扩展、无广告体验、深色/浅色主题及本地数据存储。用户可通过安装第三方插件接入各类公开音乐源，实现搜索、播放、歌词关联等功能，同时保障隐私安全。项目采用 AGPL 3.0 开源协议，强调合法合规使用。
summary.en: MusicFree is a free, ad-free music player for Android and Harmony OS built on a plugin-based architecture. It supports customizable themes, local data storage, and privacy protection. All music sources are accessed via plugins, enabling search, playback, playlist import, and lyric association from publicly available online sources. The project is open-sourced under AGPL 3.0 with emphasis on legal and ethical usage.

metadata.name: QuickLook
metadata.description: Bring macOS “Quick Look” feature to Windows

summary.zh: QuickLook 是一款为 Windows 系统打造的强大文件预览工具，灵感源自 macOS 的“Quick Look”功能。用户只需选中文件并按下空格键，即可快速预览图片、文档、视频等多种格式内容，无需打开完整应用程序。支持插件扩展，界面简洁高效，极大提升文件浏览效率。
summary.en: QuickLook brings macOS-style instant file preview to Windows. Simply select a file and press the spacebar to view images, documents, videos, and more without launching external apps. Lightweight, extensible via plugins, and highly efficient for rapid file browsing.

metadata.name: gedoor.github.io
metadata.description: 网站

summary.zh: 该仓库是开源阅读APP的官方网站，基于 Docusaurus 2 静态网站生成器构建，提供项目文档、博客和下载页面。支持通过 Markdown 文件贡献内容，目录结构清晰，便于社区协作维护。
summary.en: This repository hosts the official website for the open-source reading app, built with Docusaurus 2. It features documentation, blogs, and download pages, enabling community contributions via Markdown files with a clear directory structure.

metadata.name: servers
metadata.description: Model Context Protocol Servers

summary.zh: 该仓库是 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 的官方参考服务器集合，提供多种语言 SDK 实现示例，涵盖文件系统、Git、内存、时间等核心功能，用于演示 MCP 如何为 LLM 提供安全可控的工具与数据访问能力，适合开发者学习与二次开发。
summary.en: This repository hosts official reference implementations of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, showcasing secure, controlled access for LLMs to tools and data sources. It includes examples across multiple SDKs (Python, TypeScript, Go, etc.) and features like filesystem, Git, memory, and time operations, serving as educational resources for MCP server development.

summary.zh: 该仓库名为 'bye'，README 仅包含告别表情 'bye~👋'，无具体功能描述或代码说明，可能为测试项目、占位仓库或临时创建，目前不具备明确用途或技术内容。
summary.en: The repository named 'bye' contains only a farewell emoji 'bye~👋' in its README, with no functional description or code provided. It appears to be a test, placeholder, or temporary project with no clear purpose or technical content at this time.

metadata.name: system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
metadata.description: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models

summary.zh: 该仓库汇集了30,000+行来自Augment Code、Claude Code、Cursor、Devin AI、Windsurf等30余款主流AI编程工具的系统提示词、内部工具与模型信息，涵盖VSCode Agent、Replit、Trae等开源及闭源项目，为开发者提供深度逆向分析与工程实践参考。
summary.en: This repository aggregates over 30,000 lines of system prompts, internal tools, and AI model insights from 30+ leading AI coding agents like Augment Code, Claude Code, Cursor, Devin AI, and Windsurf, including open-source projects such as VSCode Agent and Replit, offering deep reverse-engineering value for developers.

metadata.name: remotion
metadata.description: 🎥      Make videos programmatically with React

summary.zh: Remotion 是一个基于 React 的编程式视频生成框架，允许开发者使用 CSS、Canvas、SVG、WebGL 等 Web 技术，结合变量、函数和算法动态创建视频。支持组件复用、热重载和丰富的 npm 生态，适用于个性化视频、数据可视化等场景。
summary.en: Remotion is a React-based framework for programmatically creating videos using web technologies like CSS, Canvas, SVG, and WebGL. It enables dynamic video generation through code, leveraging React's component model, hot reloading, and npm ecosystem for scalable and reusable video content.

metadata.name: gitdiagram
metadata.description: Free, simple, fast interactive diagrams for any GitHub repository

summary.zh: GitDiagram 是一款免费、快速且交互式的 GitHub 仓库可视化工具，能将任意仓库结构即时转换为系统架构图。基于 OpenAI GPT-5.2 生成 Mermaid 图表，支持点击跳转源码、导出 PNG 或复制代码，并提供私有仓库支持与自托管选项。
summary.en: GitDiagram is a free, fast, and interactive tool that instantly converts any GitHub repository into a visual system architecture diagram. Powered by OpenAI GPT-5.2, it generates Mermaid.js diagrams with clickable components, export options (PNG/Mermaid), and supports private repos via personal access tokens.

metadata.name: fastmcp
metadata.description: 🚀 The fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients.

summary.zh: FastMCP 是一个高效、Pythonic 的 MCP（Model Context Protocol）开发框架，支持快速构建生产级 MCP 服务器与客户端。通过装饰器自动处理工具注册、参数验证、文档生成及协议通信，内置最佳实践，显著降低开发复杂度。适用于连接大模型与外部工具、数据源及交互式应用。
summary.en: FastMCP is a fast, Pythonic framework for building production-ready MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers and clients. It automates schema generation, validation, documentation, and transport handling via decorators, enabling developers to focus on logic while ensuring best practices. Ideal for connecting LLMs to tools, data, and interactive UIs.

metadata.name: markitdown
metadata.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

summary.zh: MarkItDown 是微软开发的轻量级 Python 工具，用于将 PDF、Office 文档、图片、音频、HTML 等多种文件转换为 Markdown 格式，专为 LLM 文本分析优化。支持保留标题、列表、表格等结构，提供 CLI 和编程接口，并集成 MCP 服务以实现与大模型应用的无缝对接。
summary.en: MarkItDown is a lightweight Python tool by Microsoft that converts diverse file types—including PDFs, Office docs, images, audio, and HTML—into Markdown, optimized for LLM text analysis. It preserves document structure like headings and tables, offers CLI and API access, and includes an MCP server for integration with LLM applications.

metadata.name: GridBNB-USDT
metadata.description: 这是一个基于AI的自动化交易程序，专为数字货币市场（BNB/USDT）设计。该程序旨在实现全自动化交易，通过AI算法帮助用户在数字货币市场中做出更智能的交易决策。

summary.zh: GridBNB-USDT 是一款基于 Python 的企业级自动化网格交易机器人，专为币安交易所设计，支持多币种并发交易。采用动态波动率分析与 EWMA 混合算法，实现智能网格调整与多层风控，结合 Docker 容器化部署和现代化 Web 监控界面，旨在稳定捕捉数字货币市场波动收益。
summary.en: GridBNB-USDT is an enterprise-grade automated grid trading bot built in Python for Binance, supporting concurrent multi-currency trading. It leverages dynamic volatility analysis and EWMA hybrid algorithms for intelligent grid adjustment and multi-layer risk control, with Docker deployment and a modern web dashboard to capture stable returns from crypto market fluctuations.

metadata.name: Thinking-Claude
metadata.description: Let your Claude able to think

summary.zh: Thinking Claude 是一个通过自定义思维协议增强 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 模型深度思考能力的项目，包含一套系统化的提示指令和浏览器扩展。该扩展可折叠展示 Claude 的思维过程，提升可读性与交互体验，适用于日常任务中的复杂推理场景。
summary.en: Thinking Claude enhances Claude 3.5 Sonnet's reasoning by applying a structured thinking protocol via browser extension. It visualizes Claude’s internal thought process in collapsible sections, improving readability and user interaction during complex problem-solving tasks.

metadata.name: StreamCap
metadata.description: Multi-Platform Live Stream Automatic Recording Tool | 多平台直播流自动录制客户端 · 基于FFmpeg · 支持监控/定时/转码

summary.zh: StreamCap 是一款基于 FFmpeg 的多平台直播流自动录制工具，支持 40+ 国内外主流直播平台（如抖音、B站、Twitch、TikTok 等），具备循环监控、定时任务、批量录制及自动转码功能，支持 Windows/macOS/Linux 及 Web 端运行，并提供 Docker 部署方案。
summary.en: StreamCap is a multi-platform live stream recording tool based on FFmpeg, supporting 40+ major domestic and international platforms (e.g., Douyin, Bilibili, Twitch, TikTok). It features loop monitoring, scheduled tasks, batch recording, auto-transcoding, and runs on Windows/macOS/Linux and Web, with Docker support.

metadata.name: Umi-OCR
metadata.description: OCR software, free and offline. 开源、免费的离线OCR软件。支持截屏/批量导入图片，PDF文档识别，排除水印/页眉页脚，扫描/生成二维码。内置多国语言库。

summary.zh: Umi-OCR 是一款开源、免费且完全离线的文字识别工具，支持截图识别、批量图片/PDF处理、二维码扫描与生成，内置多语言OCR引擎，可排除水印区域，并提供命令行与HTTP接口调用，适用于Windows和Linux系统。
summary.en: Umi-OCR is a free, open-source, fully offline OCR software supporting screenshot capture, batch image/PDF recognition, QR code scanning/generation, watermark exclusion, multilingual models, and external integration via CLI or HTTP API on Windows and Linux.

metadata.name: droidrun
metadata.description: Automate your mobile devices with natural language commands - an LLM agnostic mobile Agent 🤖

summary.zh: DroidRun 是一个基于大语言模型（LLM）的移动设备自动化框架，支持通过自然语言指令控制 Android 和 iOS 设备。它兼容多种 LLM 提供商，具备多步任务规划、屏幕截图分析和执行追踪能力，提供 CLI 和 Python API，适用于复杂移动交互场景的自动化。
summary.en: DroidRun is an LLM-agnostic mobile automation framework that enables controlling Android and iOS devices via natural language commands. It supports multiple LLM providers, offers planning for multi-step tasks, screenshot analysis, execution tracing, and provides both CLI and extensible Python API for advanced automation use cases.

metadata.name: gemini-balance
metadata.description: Gemini polling proxy service （gemini轮询代理服务）

summary.zh: Gemini Balance 是一个基于 Python FastAPI 构建的 Gemini API 代理与负载均衡服务，支持多 API Key 轮询、密钥状态监控、模型过滤及 OpenAI 格式兼容。提供可视化配置面板、图文对话、图像编辑、网络搜索等功能，并集成日志追踪与定时任务，适用于高可用 Gemini 应用部署。
summary.en: Gemini Balance is a FastAPI-based proxy and load balancer for Google Gemini API, enabling multi-key rotation, real-time key monitoring, model filtering, and OpenAI-compatible endpoints. It features visual configuration, image-text chat, web search, detailed logging, and scheduled health checks for reliable Gemini API integration.

metadata.name: jimeng-free-api
metadata.description: 🚀 即梦3.0逆向API【特长：图像生成顶流】，零配置部署，多路token支持，仅供测试，如需商用请前往官方开放平台。

summary.zh: 即梦3.0逆向API项目提供零配置部署的图像生成服务，支持多路token轮询与OpenAI接口兼容，适用于测试场景。通过Docker、Vercel等方式快速部署，集成即梦AI每日66次免费生成额度，强调仅限研究用途，禁止商用。
summary.en: The Jimeng 3.0 reverse API enables zero-configuration deployment of high-quality image generation, supporting multi-token rotation and OpenAI-compatible interfaces. Designed for testing with 66 daily free generations, it offers Docker, Vercel, and native deployment options, strictly for research use only.

metadata.name: Roo-Code
metadata.description: Roo Code gives you a whole dev team of AI agents in your code editor.

summary.zh: Roo Code 是一款集成在代码编辑器中的 AI 驱动开发团队助手，支持多语言交互。它提供多种智能模式（如编码、架构设计、调试等），可自动生成代码、重构项目、编写文档并解答技术问题，显著提升开发效率。
summary.en: Roo Code is an AI-powered development team assistant embedded directly in your code editor, supporting multiple languages. It offers intelligent modes—such as coding, architecture, debugging, and custom workflows—to generate code, refactor projects, write documentation, and answer technical questions, boosting developer productivity.

metadata.name: BiliNote
metadata.description: AI 视频笔记生成工具 让 AI 为你的视频做笔记

summary.zh: BiliNote 是一款开源 AI 视频笔记生成工具，支持从哔哩哔哩、YouTube、抖音等平台提取视频内容，自动生成结构清晰的 Markdown 笔记。集成多模态理解、本地音频转写（Fast-Whisper）、多模型支持（OpenAI/DeepSeek/Qwen），并提供截图插入、原片跳转等功能，助力高效知识沉淀。
summary.en: BiliNote is an open-source AI-powered tool that generates structured Markdown notes from videos on platforms like Bilibili, YouTube, and TikTok. It supports multimodal understanding, local audio transcription via Fast-Whisper, multiple LLM backends (OpenAI/DeepSeek/Qwen), and features like auto-screenshots and timestamped links for efficient knowledge capture.

metadata.name: casibase
metadata.description: ⚡️AI Cloud OS: Open-source enterprise-level AI knowledge base and MCP (model-context-protocol)/A2A (agent-to-agent) management platform with admin UI, user management and Single-Sign-On⚡️, supports ChatGPT, Claude, Llama, Ollama, HuggingFace, etc., chat bot demo: https://ai.casibase.com, admin UI demo: https://ai-admin.casibase.com

summary.zh: Casibase 是一款开源的企业级 AI 云操作系统，提供知识库管理与 MCP/A2A 协议支持，集成 ChatGPT、Claude、Llama 等主流模型，具备管理后台、用户系统与单点登录功能，适用于构建私有化 AI 应用平台。
summary.en: Casibase is an open-source enterprise AI Cloud OS that manages knowledge bases and supports MCP/A2A protocols, integrating models like ChatGPT, Claude, and Llama, with admin UI, user management, and SSO for private AI platform deployment.

metadata.name: LibreTTS
metadata.description: TTS-文本转语音/文本转语音前端，兼容OpenAI、EdgeTTS等接口

summary.zh: LibreTTS 是一款免费在线文本转语音工具，支持超300种语言与口音，兼容 OpenAI 和 Edge TTS 接口。提供实时试听、语速语调调节、长文本分段、音频下载及历史记录功能，支持自定义 API 接入与 Vercel/Cloudflare 一键部署，适合多场景语音合成需求。
summary.en: LibreTTS is a free online text-to-speech tool supporting over 300 languages and accents, compatible with OpenAI and Edge TTS APIs. It offers real-time preview, speed/pitch adjustment, long-text segmentation, audio download, and history tracking. Supports custom API integration and one-click deployment on Vercel or Cloudflare.

metadata.name: ttsfm
metadata.description: TTSFM mirrors OpenAI's TTS service, providing a compatible interface for text-to-speech conversion with multiple voice options for free.

summary.zh: TTSFM 是一个免费、兼容 OpenAI 接口的文本转语音（TTS）服务，基于 openai.fm 后端实现，支持 11 种声音、6 种音频格式、语速调节、长文本自动分段与流式输出。提供 Python SDK、REST API、Web 控制台及 Docker 镜像，适用于教育与科研场景。
summary.en: TTSFM is a free, OpenAI-compatible text-to-speech service built on openai.fm, offering 11 voices, 6 audio formats, speed control, long-text handling, and real-time streaming. It includes a Python SDK, REST API, web playground, and Docker support for educational and research use.

metadata.name: d2l-zh
metadata.description: 《动手学深度学习》：面向中文读者、能运行、可讨论。中英文版被70多个国家的500多所大学用于教学。

summary.zh: 《动手学深度学习》是一本面向中文读者的开源深度学习教材，融合概念讲解、数学原理与可运行代码，强调“学以致用”。内容涵盖理论与实践，支持在线免费访问，已被全球500多所大学采用，并提供论坛讨论与持续更新，助力读者成为深度学习应用科学家。
summary.en: Dive into Deep Learning is an open-source, Chinese-accessible textbook that integrates concepts, mathematics, and executable code to teach deep learning through hands-on practice. Freely available online, it's used by over 500 universities worldwide and supports community discussion and continuous updates for aspiring AI practitioners.

metadata.name: desktop
metadata.description: Browser-Use Desktop app, control your local Chrome browser with AI agents!

summary.zh: Browser-Use Desktop 是一款基于 Electron 和 Gradio 的桌面应用，允许 AI 代理控制本地 Chrome 浏览器。它支持多种大语言模型（如 OpenAI、Google、Anthropic 等），并可直接调用用户现有浏览器会话，避免重复登录，同时支持高清录屏功能，提升自动化交互体验。
summary.en: Browser-Use Desktop is an Electron and Gradio-based app that enables AI agents to control your local Chrome browser. It supports multiple LLMs (OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, etc.), leverages existing browser sessions to bypass re-authentication, and offers HD screen recording for seamless automation.

metadata.name: n8n
metadata.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

summary.zh: n8n 是一款面向技术团队的公平代码工作流自动化平台，融合可视化构建与自定义代码能力，支持 JavaScript/Python 编写逻辑并集成 npm 包。平台原生集成 AI 功能，基于 LangChain 构建智能代理工作流，提供 400+ 应用集成、自托管或云服务选项，适用于企业级自动化场景，保障数据控制权与部署灵活性。
summary.en: n8n is a fair-code workflow automation platform for technical teams, combining visual building with custom code in JavaScript/Python and npm package support. It features native AI capabilities using LangChain for agent workflows, offers 400+ integrations, and supports both self-hosting and cloud deployment with full data control and enterprise-grade security.

metadata.name: cline
metadata.description: Autonomous coding agent right in your IDE, capable of creating/editing files, executing commands, using the browser, and more with your permission every step of the way.

summary.zh: Cline 是一款集成在 IDE 中的自主编码代理，基于 Claude Sonnet 的代理式编程能力，支持创建/编辑文件、执行终端命令、使用浏览器等功能。通过人类监督机制（每一步需用户授权），实现安全可控的 AI 驱动开发，适用于复杂项目重构、Bug 修复及全栈应用构建。
summary.en: Cline is an autonomous coding agent embedded in your IDE, powered by Claude Sonnet's agentic capabilities. It can create/edit files, run terminal commands, and interact with browsers—all under user permission. With human-in-the-loop approval for every action, it safely assists in complex development tasks like bug fixing, app building, and project navigation.

summary.zh: tv 是一个基于 Tencent EdgeOne Pages 快速部署的电视直播前端项目，提供简洁的直播流播放界面，支持多频道切换与响应式布局，适用于 IPTV 或网络电视场景。
summary.en: tv is a TV live streaming frontend project deployable via Tencent EdgeOne Pages, featuring a clean interface for channel switching and responsive design, ideal for IPTV or web-based TV platforms.

metadata.name: Maccy
metadata.description: Lightweight clipboard manager for macOS

summary.zh: Maccy 是一款专为 macOS 设计的轻量级剪贴板管理器，支持剪贴历史记录的快速搜索、导航与重用。具备键盘优先操作、原生 UI、隐私安全等特性，支持快捷键粘贴、内容去格式化、项目置顶及选择性忽略复制事件，适用于 Sonoma 14 及以上系统。
summary.en: Maccy is a lightweight, keyboard-first clipboard manager for macOS that securely stores and allows quick access to clipboard history. It features native UI, searchable history, paste with or without formatting, item pinning, and customizable ignore rules, supporting macOS Sonoma 14+.

metadata.name: xhs
metadata.description: 一个基于 Nuxt.js 3 开发的小红书工具网站，提供图文，视频，评论 浏览与导出

summary.zh: 基于 Nuxt.js 3 的小红书工具网站，支持图文、视频浏览与导出，集成 Playwright 实现浏览器自动化，提供多代理轮换、评论导出及本地数据持久化功能，采用 shadcn-nuxt 构建现代化 UI。
summary.en: A Xiaohongshu (XHS) tool website built with Nuxt.js 3, enabling browsing and exporting of posts, videos, and comments. Features include Playwright-based automation, multi-proxy rotation, local data persistence, and a modern UI powered by shadcn-nuxt.

metadata.name: clash-rules
metadata.description: 🦄️ 🎃 👻 Clash Premium 规则集(RULE-SET)，兼容 ClashX Pro、Clash for Windows 等基于 Clash Premium 内核的客户端。

summary.zh: 该项目为 Clash Premium 内核提供高质量规则集（RULE-SET），涵盖直连、代理与广告拦截域名列表，兼容 ClashX Pro、Clash for Windows 等主流客户端。数据源自 v2ray-rules-dat 与 dnsmasq-china-list，每日自动更新，支持 TUN 模式全流量接管，适用于多平台科学上网与网络优化。
summary.en: This project provides high-quality RULE-SETs for Clash Premium kernel, including direct, proxy, and ad-blocking domain lists, compatible with clients like ClashX Pro and Clash for Windows. Data sourced from v2ray-rules-dat and dnsmasq-china-list, auto-updated daily via GitHub Actions, supporting TUN mode for full traffic control across platforms.

metadata.name: an-codeAI
metadata.description: AI generate code

summary.zh: needware.dev 是一个开源的 AI 驱动全栈开发平台，支持在浏览器中直接生成、预览和部署 Web 应用。它通过多智能体系统，将想法、截图或 URL 转化为功能完整的代码，集成多种 AI 模型（如 OpenAI、Anthropic），并提供实时预览、数据库支持（Supabase）和可视化编辑功能，极大提升开发效率。
summary.en: needware.dev is an open-source, AI-powered full-stack development platform that generates, previews, and deploys web apps directly in the browser. Using a multi-agent system, it transforms ideas, screenshots, or URLs into functional code, supports multiple AI models (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.), and offers real-time preview, Supabase integration, and visual editing for streamlined development.

metadata.name: wxocr
metadata.description: nothing

summary.zh: 该仓库为 golangboy/wxocr，目前无详细描述与 README 内容，推测可能是一个基于 Go 语言开发的微信 OCR（光学字符识别）相关工具或接口封装，具体功能尚不明确，需进一步查看代码实现以确认其用途与技术细节。
summary.en: The repository golangboy/wxocr lacks detailed description and README content. It is likely a Go-based tool or wrapper related to WeChat OCR (Optical Character Recognition), though its exact functionality remains unclear without examining the source code.

metadata.name: chatlog
metadata.description: chat log tool, easily use your own chat data. 聊天记录工具，轻松使用自己的聊天数据

summary.zh: 该项目因收到微信官方合规风险通知，已于2025年10月20日彻底移除全部代码与提交历史。原定位为个人聊天记录管理工具，支持用户自主使用本地聊天数据，但因涉及第三方平台数据合规问题被迫终止。项目不再提供任何代码、支持或更新。
summary.en: The project was fully removed on October 20, 2025, after receiving a compliance notice from WeChat regarding legal risks. Originally designed as a personal chat log management tool for users to utilize their own chat data, it was discontinued due to third-party platform compliance issues. No code, support, or updates are now available.

metadata.name: Spark-TTS
metadata.description: Spark-TTS Inference Code

summary.zh: Spark-TTS 是一款基于 Qwen2.5 大语言模型的高效语音合成系统，支持中英双语零样本语音克隆与可控语音生成。其采用单流解耦语音标记架构，无需额外生成模型即可直接从 LLM 预测的编码重构音频，显著提升推理效率与语音自然度，适用于跨语言及代码切换场景。
summary.en: Spark-TTS is an efficient LLM-based text-to-speech model built on Qwen2.5, enabling high-quality zero-shot voice cloning and controllable speech synthesis in both Chinese and English. It uses single-stream decoupled speech tokens to directly reconstruct audio from LLM-predicted codes, eliminating the need for auxiliary generative models and improving inference efficiency.

metadata.name: awesome-mcp-clients
metadata.description: A collection of MCP clients.

summary.zh: 这是一个精选的 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 客户端集合，涵盖 CLI、桌面应用、IDE 插件等多种类型，支持文件访问、数据库连接、API 集成等功能，助力 AI 模型与本地及远程资源安全交互。
summary.en: A curated collection of Model Context Protocol (MCP) clients, including CLI tools, desktop apps, and IDE integrations, enabling AI models to securely interact with local and remote resources via standardized interfaces.

metadata.name: bookmark-summary
metadata.description: 用 LLM 和 jina reader 生成的总结

summary.zh: 该项目利用 Jina Reader 抓取书签网页内容，并通过 LLM 自动生成摘要，实现自动化知识整理。适用于个人知识管理、阅读归档与内容沉淀，结合 GitHub Action 可构建持续更新的数字阅读档案系统。
summary.en: This project uses Jina Reader to extract text from bookmarked web pages and leverages LLMs to generate summaries automatically. It enables automated knowledge curation, ideal for personal knowledge management, reading archiving, and building a continuously updated digital reading archive via GitHub Actions.

metadata.name: web_clipper
metadata.description: singleFile + gh pages + deepseek api + notion db + tg bot = web clipper and notify

summary.zh: 该仓库是一个网页剪藏后端服务，结合 singleFile 插件将网页保存为 HTML 文件，自动上传至 GitHub Pages 并同步到 Notion 数据库，利用 DeepSeek API 生成摘要与标签，并通过 Telegram 发送通知，支持 Docker 部署与 API 密钥认证。
summary.en: This repo provides a web clipper backend that saves webpages as HTML via singleFile, uploads them to GitHub Pages, syncs to Notion with AI-generated summaries and tags using DeepSeek API, and sends notifications via Telegram, supporting Docker deployment and API key authentication.

metadata.name: gpt_academic
metadata.description: 为GPT/GLM等LLM大语言模型提供实用化交互接口，特别优化论文阅读/润色/写作体验，模块化设计，支持自定义快捷按钮&函数插件，支持Python和C++等项目剖析&自译解功能，PDF/LaTex论文翻译&总结功能，支持并行问询多种LLM模型，支持chatglm3等本地模型。接入通义千问, deepseekcoder, 讯飞星火, 文心一言, llama2, rwkv, claude2, moss等。

summary.zh: GPT Academic 是一个专为学术研究优化的 LLM 交互平台，支持多模型并行调用（如通义千问、GLM、DeepSeek、Claude 等），深度集成论文翻译、总结、润色与写作功能，支持 PDF/LaTeX 解析及 Python/C++ 项目自译解，提供模块化插件系统与自定义快捷按钮，显著提升科研效率。
summary.en: GPT Academic is a research-optimized LLM interface supporting parallel queries across models like Qwen, GLM, DeepSeek, and Claude. It specializes in paper translation, summarization, polishing, and writing, with built-in PDF/LaTeX parsing, code self-analysis for Python/C++, modular plugins, and customizable shortcuts to boost academic productivity.

metadata.name: maple-font
metadata.description: Maple Mono: Open source monospace font with round corner, ligatures and Nerd-Font icons for IDE and terminal, fine-grained customization options. 带连字和控制台图标的圆角等宽字体，中英文宽度完美2:1，细粒度的自定义选项

summary.zh: Maple Mono 是一款开源等宽字体，专为提升编程体验设计。具备圆角风格、智能连字、Nerd-Font 图标支持，以及细粒度自定义功能。V7 版本全面重构，支持可变字体格式，并优化超过半数字形。中文版本基于 Resource Han Rounded，实现中英文 2:1 完美对齐，适用于 IDE 与终端环境。
summary.en: Maple Mono is an open-source monospace font designed to enhance coding experience. It features rounded corners, smart ligatures, full Nerd-Font icon support, and fine-grained customization. Version 7 is a complete remake with variable font format and redesigned glyphs. The CN version ensures perfect 2:1 alignment between Chinese and English characters, ideal for IDEs and terminals.

metadata.name: chatmcp
metadata.description: ChatMCP is an AI chat client implementing the Model Context Protocol (MCP).

summary.zh: ChatMCP 是一款跨平台 AI 聊天客户端，支持 macOS、Windows、Linux、iOS、Android 和 Web，实现了 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 协议。支持多模态内容展示（如 LaTeX、Mermaid、HTML 预览）、本地局域网数据同步，并提供丰富的 MCP 工具集成与 LLM 提供商适配。
summary.en: ChatMCP is a cross-platform AI chat client supporting macOS, Windows, Linux, iOS, Android, and Web, implementing the Model Context Protocol (MCP). It features rich content rendering (LaTeX, Mermaid, HTML), local network data sync, and deep integration with MCP tools and LLM providers.

metadata.name: py-iztro
metadata.description: 著名紫薇排盘工具iztro的python版本，用法和原版完全一致

summary.zh: py-iztro 是著名紫微斗数排盘工具 iztro 的 Python 实现，完全兼容原版 API 与逻辑，支持通过公历时间、性别等信息生成详细命盘。项目基于 pydantic 构建类型安全的数据模型，代码结构清晰，便于集成与扩展，适用于命理分析、文化研究及 API 服务开发。
summary.en: py-iztro is a Python port of the renowned Ziwei Doushu charting tool iztro, fully compatible with the original API and logic. It generates detailed astrological charts using solar date, gender, and other inputs. Built with pydantic for type-safe data modeling, it's ideal for fortune-telling analysis, cultural research, and API integration.

metadata.name: iztro
metadata.description: ⭐This is a lightweight kit for generating astrolabes for Zi Wei Dou Shu (The Purple Star Astrology), an ancient Chinese astrology. It allows you to obtain your horoscope and personality analysis. 支持多语言轻量级获取紫微斗数排盘信息的javascript开源库。

summary.zh: iztro 是一个轻量级 JavaScript 开源库，专为紫微斗数排盘设计，支持阳历/农历生日输入，可生成完整星盘、四柱、运限及星耀分析，并提供多语言输出（中、英、日、韩、越）。支持链式调用与插件扩展，适配不同流派规则，适用于命理研究与个人星象分析。
summary.en: iztro is a lightweight JavaScript library for Zi Wei Dou Shu (Purple Star Astrology) chart generation. It supports solar/lunar birth dates, outputs full astrolabes, four pillars, fortune cycles, and star analyses in multiple languages. Features fluent chaining, plugin support, and customizable configurations for diverse astrological schools.

metadata.name: fake-cursor
metadata.description: 一个用于重新生成 Cursor 设备 ID 和设置 Access Token 的 Cursor 扩展

summary.zh: Fake Cursor 是一款 Cursor 编辑器扩展，用于重新生成设备 ID、修补机器码获取逻辑及设置 Access Token，支持多账号切换与使用情况监控。适用于 Cursor 0.45.x–0.46.x 版本，需手动执行命令并重启生效，操作前自动备份配置。
summary.en: Fake Cursor is a Cursor editor extension that regenerates device IDs, patches machine ID logic, and sets Access Tokens to enable multi-account usage. It includes usage monitoring and supports Cursor 0.45.x–0.46.x, requiring manual command execution and restart. Configurations are auto-backed up before changes.

metadata.name: pot-desktop
metadata.description: 🌈一个跨平台的划词翻译和OCR软件 | A cross-platform software for text translation and recognition.

summary.zh: Pot 是一款基于 Tauri 框架开发的跨平台划词翻译与 OCR 软件，支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 系统。它提供多接口并行翻译、截图 OCR、语音合成、插件扩展及外部调用等功能，兼容 Wayland 显示协议，并集成 OpenAI、DeepL、Google 等主流翻译引擎，满足高效语言处理需求。
summary.en: Pot is a cross-platform text translation and OCR tool built with Tauri, supporting Windows, macOS, and Linux. It features multi-engine parallel translation, screenshot OCR, TTS, plugin system, external API integration, and Wayland compatibility, powered by engines like OpenAI, DeepL, and Google Translate.

metadata.name: STranslate
metadata.description: A ready-to-go translation ocr tool developed with WPF/WPF 开发的一款即用即走的翻译、OCR工具

summary.zh: STranslate 是一款基于 WPF 开发的即用型翻译与 OCR 工具，支持快速截图识别和文本翻译，开箱即用无需复杂配置。适用于多语言学习、文档处理等场景，提供简洁高效的本地化体验。
summary.en: STranslate is a ready-to-use translation and OCR tool built with WPF, enabling instant screenshot recognition and text translation. Designed for language learning and document processing, it offers a lightweight, plug-and-play experience with no complex setup required.

metadata.name: checkchan-dist
metadata.description: Check酱：监测网页内容变化，并发送异动到微信。亦支持http status、json和rss监测。配合自架云端，关电脑后也能运行。

summary.zh: Check酱是一款网页内容监控工具，支持通过浏览器插件可视化选择监测目标，实时检测网页文本、HTTP状态、JSON及RSS变化，并可通过Server酱推送异动至微信。配合自架Docker云端，可在关电脑后持续运行，适用于动态页面、需登录后台等复杂场景。
summary.en: Check酱 is a web content monitoring tool that uses a browser extension to visually select elements and detect changes in text, HTTP status, JSON, or RSS feeds. It sends alerts via Server酱 to WeChat and supports self-hosted Docker cloud deployment for 24/7 monitoring, even with dynamic or login-required pages.

metadata.name: browser-use
metadata.description: 🌐 Make websites accessible for AI agents. Automate tasks online with ease.

summary.zh: browser-use 是一个让 AI 代理能够访问和操作网页的开源工具，支持通过大语言模型（LLM）自动化执行在线任务。它提供本地与云端浏览器控制能力，集成多种 LLM 接口（如 Google、Anthropic），适用于网页抓取、表单填写、信息提取等场景，具备 stealth 模式以绕过反爬机制。
summary.en: browser-use enables AI agents to interact with and automate tasks on websites using large language models (LLMs). It supports both local and cloud-based browser control, integrates with multiple LLM providers like Google and Anthropic, and offers stealth capabilities to evade anti-bot detection—ideal for web scraping, form automation, and data extraction.

metadata.name: FastGPT
metadata.description: FastGPT is a knowledge-based platform built on the LLMs, offers a comprehensive suite of out-of-the-box capabilities such as data processing, RAG retrieval, and visual AI workflow orchestration, letting you easily develop and deploy complex question-answering systems without the need for extensive setup or configuration.

summary.zh: FastGPT 是一个基于大语言模型（LLM）的 AI Agent 构建平台，提供数据处理、RAG 检索和可视化工作流编排等开箱即用能力，支持快速构建复杂问答系统。通过 Flow 可视化流程设计，用户无需复杂配置即可实现知识库管理、对话调试、模型调用及运营分析，适用于私有化部署与云服务场景。
summary.en: FastGPT is an AI Agent development platform built on large language models (LLMs), offering out-of-the-box capabilities including data processing, RAG retrieval, and visual workflow orchestration via Flow. It enables rapid development of complex QA systems with minimal setup, supporting knowledge base management, conversation debugging, model integration, and operational analytics for both private and cloud deployments.

metadata.name: pollinations
metadata.description: Your Friendly Open-Source Gen-AI Platform

summary.zh: Pollinations 是一个开源的生成式 AI 平台，致力于为创作者提供友好、易用的 AI 工具。平台支持图像生成、故事创作、艺术治疗等多种应用场景，并通过统一的 API 和丰富的 SDK 支持开发者快速集成。其生态包含多个创新应用，如 D&D 道具生成器、AI 餐食规划等，体现开源协作与创意落地的结合。
summary.en: Pollinations is an open-source generative AI platform designed for creators, offering user-friendly tools for image generation, storytelling, art therapy, and more. With a unified API and SDKs, it enables seamless integration for developers. The ecosystem includes innovative apps like D&D item generators and AI meal planners, showcasing open collaboration and creative implementation.

metadata.name: moepush
metadata.description: 一个基于 NextJS + Cloudflare 技术栈构建的可爱消息推送服务, 支持多种消息推送渠道✨

summary.zh: MoePush 是一个基于 Next.js 和 Cloudflare 技术栈构建的开源消息推送服务，支持钉钉、企业微信、Telegram、飞书、Discord、Bark 及通用 Webhook 等多种渠道。提供精美 UI、接口组批量推送、GitHub 登录认证，并可通过 Cloudflare Pages 快速免费部署，适合个人或团队集成使用。
summary.en: MoePush is an open-source notification service built with Next.js and Cloudflare, supporting multiple channels like DingTalk, WeChat Work, Telegram, Lark, Discord, Bark, and Webhooks. It features a polished UI, batch push via interface groups, GitHub OAuth login, and easy deployment on Cloudflare Pages, ideal for personal or team integration.

metadata.name: deepchat
metadata.description: 🐬DeepChat - A smart assistant that connects powerful AI to your personal world

summary.zh: DeepChat 是一款功能丰富的开源 AI 智能体平台，支持多 LLM 聊天、MCP 工具调用及 ACP 智能体集成。它统一了模型、工具与智能体运行环境，兼容 OpenAI、Gemini、Anthropic 及本地 Ollama 等主流模型，提供桌面级流畅体验，适用于个人与开发者构建个性化 AI 助手。
summary.en: DeepChat is a powerful open-source AI agent platform that unifies models, tools, and agent runtimes in a desktop app. It supports multi-LLM chat, MCP tool calling, and ACP agent integration, compatible with OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic, and local Ollama models, enabling personalized AI assistants with smooth user experience.

metadata.name: system_architect
metadata.description: :100: 2026年系统架构设计师（软考高级）备考资料。

summary.zh: 该项目为2026年系统架构设计师（软考高级）备考资料库，自2018年起持续更新，涵盖历年真题、精讲视频、模拟题及论文范文等全套复习资源。提供多平台免费刷题工具链接，部分最新资料需通过官网获取，旨在帮助考生高效低成本通过考试。
summary.en: This repository provides comprehensive study materials for the 2026 System Architect Certification (Senior Level, China Soft Exam), including past exam papers, video lectures, mock tests, and essay templates. It has been maintained since 2018 and offers free access to multiple online and app-based practice tools, with some updated resources available via the official website.

metadata.name: deepseek-free-api
metadata.description: 🚀 DeepSeek-V3 & R1大模型逆向API【特长：良心厂商】（官方贼便宜，建议直接走官方），支持高速流式输出、多轮对话，联网搜索，R1深度思考，零配置部署，多路token支持，仅供测试，如需商用请前往官方开放平台。

summary.zh: 该项目为 DeepSeek-V3 和 R1 大模型的逆向 API 封装，支持流式输出、多轮对话、联网搜索及 R1 深度思考功能，提供零配置 Docker 部署方案，兼容 ChatGPT 接口，适用于个人测试与研究，强调非商用及合规使用。
summary.en: This project provides a reverse-engineered API for DeepSeek-V3 and R1 models, supporting streaming output, multi-turn conversations, web search, and R1 deep reasoning. It offers zero-config Docker deployment, is fully compatible with ChatGPT API, and is intended for personal testing and research only.

metadata.name: hacker-podcast
metadata.description: 一个基于 AI 的 Hacker News 中文播客项目，每天自动抓取 Hacker News 热门文章，通过 AI 生成中文总结并转换为播客内容。

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 AI 的 Hacker News 中文播客生成器，每日自动抓取热门文章，利用 OpenAI 生成中文摘要与播报文稿，并通过 TTS 合成语音，部署于 Cloudflare Workers，支持多平台订阅。
summary.en: An AI-powered Chinese podcast generator for Hacker News, automatically fetching daily top stories, summarizing them in Chinese via OpenAI, converting to audio with TTS, and deploying on Cloudflare Workers with multi-platform RSS support.

metadata.name: Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
metadata.description: Open-source Windows and Office activator featuring HWID, Ohook, TSforge, and Online KMS activation methods, along with advanced troubleshooting.

summary.zh: Microsoft Activation Scripts (MAS) 是一款开源工具，支持通过 HWID、Ohook、TSforge 和在线 KMS 等多种方式激活 Windows 和 Office，并提供高级故障排查功能。用户可通过 PowerShell 一键运行或下载脚本文件执行，兼容 Windows 8.1 及以上系统，适用于正版验证绕过场景。
summary.en: Microsoft Activation Scripts (MAS) is an open-source tool that activates Windows and Office using HWID, Ohook, TSforge, and Online KMS methods, with advanced troubleshooting. It supports one-click PowerShell execution or traditional script download, compatible with Windows 8.1 and later for license activation bypass.

metadata.name: anx-reader
metadata.description: Featuring powerful AI capabilities and supporting various e-book formats, it makes reading smarter and more focused.

summary.zh: Anx Reader 是一款专为阅读爱好者打造的多平台电子书阅读器，支持 EPUB、MOBI、PDF 等主流格式，集成 AI 助手实现智能书架整理、思维导图生成、词典翻译与内容摘要。提供深度个性化阅读设置、笔记管理、阅读数据统计及 TTS 朗读等功能，致力于提升专注力与阅读体验。
summary.en: Anx Reader is a cross-platform e-book reader designed for book lovers, supporting formats like EPUB, MOBI, and PDF. It integrates AI-powered features such as smart shelf organization, mind map generation, translation, and summaries. With customizable reading settings, note management, reading analytics, and TTS support, it enhances focus and delivers a pure reading experience.

metadata.name: ragflow
metadata.description: RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs

summary.zh: RAGFlow 是一款领先的开源检索增强生成（RAG）引擎，融合先进 RAG 技术与智能体（Agent）能力，为大型语言模型构建高质量上下文层。支持企业级可扩展部署，提供端到端 RAG 工作流与预置智能体模板，显著提升 LLM 应用的准确性与可控性。
summary.en: RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that integrates advanced RAG with Agent capabilities to deliver a superior context layer for LLMs. It enables scalable, enterprise-ready RAG workflows with pre-built agent templates, enhancing accuracy and controllability in LLM applications.

metadata.name: HanAnalytics
metadata.description: 一个简单的网络分析跟踪器和仪表板，在 Cloudflare Pages 上即可快速部署的网站分析仪表板,无成本稳定运行

summary.zh: Han-Analytics 是一款基于 Cloudflare Pages 和 Workers 构建的轻量级网站分析工具，支持零成本部署，每日可免费处理10万次访问统计。无需服务器、数据库或域名，集成简单，支持密码保护和网站白名单，数据通过 Cloudflare Analytics Engine 实时采集与展示。
summary.en: Han-Analytics is a lightweight web analytics tool built on Cloudflare Pages and Workers, enabling zero-cost deployment with up to 100k free daily stats. It requires no server, database, or domain, offers password protection and site whitelisting, and leverages Cloudflare Analytics Engine for real-time data collection and visualization.

metadata.name: onlook
metadata.description: The Cursor for Designers • An Open-Source AI-First Design tool • Visually build, style, and edit your React App with AI

summary.zh: Onlook 是一款开源的 AI 优先设计工具，专为设计师和开发者打造。它提供类 Figma 的可视化界面，支持在浏览器中实时编辑 React 应用，结合 Next.js 与 TailwindCSS，实现从文本或图像快速生成原型，并具备代码编辑、分支实验、实时预览与一键部署等功能，是 Webflow、Figma Make 等工具的开放替代方案。
summary.en: Onlook is an open-source, AI-first design tool that enables visual building, styling, and editing of React apps directly in the browser. Built for designers and developers, it offers a Figma-like interface with real-time code editing, Next.js + TailwindCSS support, instant prototyping from text or image, and one-click deployment—serving as an open alternative to tools like Webflow and Figma Make.

metadata.name: meDisplay
metadata.description: 使用任何设备(浏览器)作为mac的副屏(随航) 将Android平板用作Mac的第二台显示器 还能在Win和Linux镜像屏幕

summary.zh: 咩Display 是一款将任意设备浏览器变为 Mac 副屏的工具，支持 Android 平板作为第二显示器，实现类似 Apple 随航功能。基于 ffmpeg 实现实时视频转码，支持 mjpg、vp8、h264、hevc 编码，延迟低至 100ms。同时支持 Windows 和 Linux 屏幕镜像，具备自动旋转与多平台适配能力。
summary.en: meDisplay turns any browser-enabled device into a secondary display for Mac, enabling Android tablets to act as extended monitors with Apple Sidecar-like functionality. It uses ffmpeg for real-time video transcoding, supporting mjpg, vp8, h264, and hevc codecs with latency as low as 100ms. Also supports screen mirroring on Windows and Linux with auto-rotation.

metadata.name: anything-llm
metadata.description: The all-in-one Desktop & Docker AI application with built-in RAG, AI agents, No-code agent builder, MCP compatibility,  and more.

summary.zh: AnythingLLM 是一款一体化桌面与 Docker AI 应用，内置 RAG、AI 智能体、无代码智能体构建器和 MCP 兼容性，支持多用户管理与权限控制，可轻松将任意文档转化为 LLM 可用的上下文，实现与文档的智能对话。
summary.en: AnythingLLM is an all-in-one desktop and Docker AI application featuring built-in RAG, AI agents, a no-code agent builder, and MCP compatibility. It enables users to chat with documents by converting any content into LLM-usable context, with support for multi-user management and flexible LLM/vector database selection.

metadata.name: rag-web-ui
metadata.description: RAG Web UI is an intelligent dialogue system based on RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) technology.

summary.zh: RAG Web UI 是一个基于检索增强生成（RAG）技术的智能对话系统，支持多格式文档管理、自动分块与向量化，集成多种 LLM（如 OpenAI、DeepSeek、Ollama），提供前后端分离架构、高性能向量数据库（ChromaDB/Qdrant）及 OpenAPI 接口，适用于构建私有知识库问答服务。
summary.en: RAG Web UI is an intelligent dialogue system leveraging Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) technology. It supports multi-format document ingestion, automatic chunking and vectorization, integrates with various LLMs (OpenAI, DeepSeek, Ollama), and offers a frontend-backend separated architecture with high-performance vector databases (ChromaDB/Qdrant) and OpenAPI support for private knowledge base Q&A.

metadata.name: wool_scripts
metadata.description: 收集一些Loon、Surge、QuantumultX、ShadowRocket、Egern的配置与去广告规则。

summary.zh: 该项目收集了适用于 Loon、Surge、Quantumult X、ShadowRocket 和 Egern 等多款代理工具的规则配置与去广告脚本，旨在净化网络浏览体验。内容涵盖分流规则、插件及图标资源，部分规则支持修改 IP 归属（如抖音），并强调开源精神与合规使用。
summary.en: This repository collects configuration files and ad-blocking rules for proxy tools like Loon, Surge, Quantumult X, ShadowRocket, and Egern. It aims to purify the browsing experience with routing rules, plugins, and icon resources, including IP spoofing support (e.g., for Douyin), while promoting open-source ethics and responsible usage.

metadata.name: midjourney-proxy
metadata.description: 🦄 The world's largest Midjourney drawing API, generating over 1 million drawings daily, supporting Discord Youchuan Midjourney 🐂！

summary.zh: 该项目是全球最大的免费开源 Midjourney API 代理平台，日处理绘图超百万张，支持通过 Discord 和悠船接入 Midjourney 绘图服务。提供完整 API 接口、分布式部署、账号池管理、任务进度追踪、中文翻译、敏感词过滤、图片/视频一键换脸等功能，并内置管理后台与 Swagger 文档，兼容主流绘图客户端。
summary.en: This is the world's largest free and open-source Midjourney API proxy platform, generating over 1 million images daily. It supports drawing via Discord and Youchuan, offering full-featured APIs, distributed deployment, account pool management, real-time task tracking, Chinese prompt translation, content filtering, and one-click face swapping for images and videos, with an integrated admin UI and Swagger docs.

metadata.name: go-cursor-help
metadata.description: 解决Cursor在免费订阅期间出现以下提示的问题:  Your request has been blocked as our system has detected suspicious activity / You've reached your trial request limit.  /  Too many free trial accounts used on this machine.

summary.zh: 该项目提供Cursor免费试用重置工具，解决因异常活动或试用次数超限导致的账号封锁问题，同时售卖高额度Cursor Pro会员账号及Google Gemini订阅服务，支持多种付费套餐与官方计费保障。
summary.en: This repo offers a Cursor free trial reset tool to bypass blocks like 'suspicious activity' or 'trial limit reached', and sells high-credit Cursor Pro accounts and Google Gemini subscriptions with official billing and tiered pricing plans.

metadata.name: GenQL
metadata.description: Generate SQL query from natural language.

summary.zh: GenQL 是一款将自然语言转换为 SQL 查询的工具，通过数据库模式索引与向量搜索技术，实现高效精准的查询生成。支持语音输入、查询历史、表引用分析及暗色模式，适用于数据分析、应用开发和团队协作，显著提升非技术用户与开发者之间的数据库交互效率。
summary.en: GenQL translates natural language into precise SQL queries using schema indexing and vector search. It supports voice input, query history, table relevance scoring, and dark mode, enabling seamless database interaction for both technical and non-technical users in reporting, development, and collaboration.

metadata.name: VutronMusic
metadata.description: 高颜值的第三方网易云播放器；支持流媒体音乐，如navidrome、jellyfin、emby；支持本地音乐播放、离线歌单、逐字歌词、桌面歌词、Touch Bar歌词、Mac状态栏歌词显示、Linux-gnome与Linux-kde桌面状态栏歌词显示；支持降调降速，支持自定义主题等。支持 Windows / macOS / Linux :electron:

summary.zh: VutronMusic 是一款高颜值的第三方网易云音乐播放器，基于 Electron 构建，支持 Windows/macOS/Linux 多平台。集成 Vue3 + TypeScript + Pinia 技术栈，支持本地与流媒体音乐播放（Navidrome/Jellyfin/Emby），提供逐字歌词、桌面歌词、Touch Bar 及状态栏歌词显示，具备变调变速、自定义主题等高级功能。
summary.en: VutronMusic is a visually appealing third-party NetEase Cloud Music player built with Electron, supporting Windows, macOS, and Linux. Powered by Vue3, TypeScript, and Pinia, it enables local and streaming music playback (Navidrome/Jellyfin/Emby), featuring word-by-word lyrics, desktop/Touch Bar/status bar lyrics, pitch/speed control, and customizable themes.

metadata.name: feishin
metadata.description: A modern self-hosted music player.

summary.zh: Feishin 是一款现代化的自托管音乐播放器，基于 Sonixd 重构，支持 MPV 和 Web 播放器后端，提供现代 UI、智能播放列表编辑、歌词同步及播放记录回传功能。适用于桌面端，支持 macOS 和 Linux，可通过 AppImage 快速安装。
summary.en: Feishin is a modern self-hosted music player, rewritten from Sonixd, featuring MPV and web player backends, a sleek UI, smart playlist editing, synchronized lyrics, and scrobbling. It supports desktop platforms with easy AppImage installation on Linux and macOS.

metadata.name: artab
metadata.description: Get Inspired by the World's Greatest Artworks Every Time You Open a New Tab. Extension Available for Chrome, Edge, and Firefox.

summary.zh: Artab 是一款浏览器新标签页扩展，每次打开新标签时展示世界顶级艺术作品，支持 Chrome、Edge 和 Firefox。项目采用现代前端技术栈开发，结构清晰，包含共享存储模块与独立页面组件，适合艺术爱好者与前端开发者参考学习。
summary.en: Artab is a browser extension that displays iconic artworks every time you open a new tab, available for Chrome, Edge, and Firefox. Built with a modular architecture using modern frontend tools, it features shared storage and dedicated UI pages, ideal for art lovers and developers alike.

metadata.name: moemail
metadata.description: A cute temporary email service built with NextJS + Cloudflare technology stack 🎉 | 一个基于 NextJS + Cloudflare 技术栈构建的可爱临时邮箱服务🎉

summary.zh: MoeMail 是一个基于 Next.js 和 Cloudflare 技术栈构建的可爱临时邮箱服务，支持隐私保护、实时收件、多语言界面、PWA 安装、邮件发送、Webhook 通知及 OpenAPI 访问。采用 D1 数据库与 Email Workers 实现高效自托管，完全免费且支持角色权限管理。
summary.en: MoeMail is a cute temporary email service built with Next.js and Cloudflare stack, featuring privacy protection, real-time email reception, multi-language UI, PWA support, email sending via Resend, webhook notifications, OpenAPI access, and free self-hosting using D1 and Email Workers.

metadata.name: Video_note_generator
metadata.description: 一键将视频转换为优质小红书笔记，自动优化内容和配图

summary.zh: 该项目是一款自动化视频转小红书笔记工具，支持从视频中提取音频、语音转文字、AI内容优化及配图生成。V2.0版本升级为FastAPI Web界面，新增博客文章生成、批量处理、智能错误重试和长视频支持，极大提升内容创作者效率。
summary.en: This project is an automated tool that converts videos into high-quality Xiaohongshu notes. It extracts audio, transcribes speech via Whisper, optimizes content with AI, and generates relevant images. Version 2.0 features a FastAPI web UI, adds blog post generation, batch processing, smart retry on rate limits, and supports long videos up to 30 minutes.

metadata.name: cursor-vip
metadata.description: cursor IDE enjoy VIP

summary.zh: cursor-vip 是一款为 Cursor IDE 提供共享 VIP 权限的工具，支持多平台安装与代理模式配置，用户可通过脚本或手动方式激活 VIP 功能，享受代码提示与 AI 对话服务。项目强调非官方性质，稳定性低于官方订阅，但成本感知更低。
summary.en: cursor-vip is a tool that enables shared VIP access for the Cursor IDE, supporting cross-platform installation and proxy mode configuration. Users can activate VIP features via scripts or manual binary download to enjoy AI-powered code suggestions and chat. The project emphasizes its unofficial nature, with lower stability than official subscriptions but perceived cost savings.

summary.zh: Cursor Fake Machine 是一款用于重置 Cursor 编辑器机器标识（machine ID）的 VS Code 扩展，帮助用户绕过设备绑定限制。通过快捷键触发命令，支持手动删除 machineid 文件并重启生效，适用于多账号切换或试用重置场景。
summary.en: Cursor Fake Machine is a VS Code extension that resets the machine ID of the Cursor editor, allowing users to bypass device binding restrictions. It triggers via a command palette shortcut, supports manual deletion of the machineid file, and requires a restart to take effect—ideal for multi-account switching or trial resets.

metadata.name: acme.sh
metadata.description: A pure Unix shell script ACME client for SSL / TLS certificate automation

summary.zh: acme.sh 是一个完全用 Unix Shell 编写的 ACME 协议客户端，用于自动化获取和续期 SSL/TLS 证书。支持 ECDSA、SAN 和通配符证书，兼容 Bash、dash 等主流 Shell，可在 FreeBSD、Linux、macOS、Windows 等数十种系统上运行，部署简单，仅需 3 分钟即可上手。
summary.en: acme.sh is a pure Unix shell script ACME client for automating SSL/TLS certificate issuance and renewal. It fully implements the ACME protocol, supports ECDSA, SAN, and wildcard certificates, and runs on Bash, dash, and various OS including Linux, macOS, Windows, and BSD variants with minimal setup.

metadata.name: Color-diffusion
metadata.description: A diffusion model to colorize black and white images

summary.zh: 该项目利用扩散模型为黑白图像上色，采用LAB色彩空间分离亮度与颜色信息。模型基于UNet架构，在训练时仅对AB颜色通道加噪，保留L通道作为条件输入，并结合灰度图特征进行条件化去噪。项目展示了前向扩散与去噪过程的可视化，适用于图像修复与历史影像复原等场景。
summary.en: This project uses diffusion models to colorize grayscale images by leveraging the LAB color space, where the L channel (grayscale) is preserved and only the AB color channels are noised during training. A UNet-based model denoises the color channels conditioned on the L channel and extracted grayscale features, enabling realistic color restoration for applications like photo restoration and archival imaging.

metadata.name: developer-roadmap
metadata.description: Interactive roadmaps, guides and other educational content to help developers grow in their careers.

summary.zh: developer-roadmap 是一个社区驱动的开发者成长指南项目，提供交互式路线图、最佳实践和学习资源，涵盖前端、后端、DevOps、AI、数据科学等多个技术领域，帮助开发者系统规划职业路径并掌握核心技能。
summary.en: developer-roadmap is a community-driven project offering interactive roadmaps, best practices, and learning resources for developers. It covers key areas like frontend, backend, DevOps, AI, and data science, helping developers systematically plan their career growth and master essential skills.

metadata.name: playwright-python
metadata.description: Python version of the Playwright testing and automation library.

summary.zh: Playwright for Python 是一个用于自动化 Chromium、Firefox 和 WebKit 浏览器的库，提供统一 API 实现跨浏览器测试与网页自动化。支持同步与异步编程模型，具备高效、可靠、快速的特点，适用于端到端测试、爬虫和 UI 自动化等场景。
summary.en: Playwright for Python is a library for automating Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit browsers via a unified API. It supports both sync and async programming models, enabling reliable, fast, and capable browser automation for testing, scraping, and UI workflows.

metadata.name: playwright
metadata.description: Playwright is a framework for Web Testing and Automation. It allows testing Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API.

summary.zh: Playwright 是一个跨浏览器 Web 测试与自动化框架，支持 Chromium、Firefox 和 WebKit，提供统一 API。具备自动等待、Web 优先断言和追踪功能，确保测试稳定可靠，避免常见的不稳定问题，适用于端到端测试和自动化任务。
summary.en: Playwright is a cross-browser web testing and automation framework supporting Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit via a unified API. It features auto-waiting, web-first assertions, and tracing to ensure resilient, flake-free end-to-end testing and automation across platforms.

metadata.name: bananas
metadata.description: Bananas🍌, Cross-Platform screen 🖥️ sharing 📡 made simple ⚡.

summary.zh: Bananas 是一款跨平台的屏幕共享工具，支持 macOS、Windows 和 Linux。它采用点对点（P2P）连接技术，无需注册账户或依赖中心服务器即可实现快速屏幕共享，仅需 STUN/TURN 和信令服务器辅助建立初始连接，简洁高效且注重隐私。
summary.en: Bananas is a cross-platform screen sharing tool for macOS, Windows, and Linux. It uses peer-to-peer (P2P) connections to share screens without requiring user accounts or central servers—only STUN/TURN and signaling servers are used for initial handshake, ensuring simplicity, speed, and privacy.

metadata.name: scrcpy
metadata.description: Display and control your Android device

summary.zh: scrcpy 是一款轻量级、高性能的开源工具，用于通过 USB 或 Wi-Fi 将 Android 设备屏幕镜像到电脑，并支持键鼠控制。无需 root 或安装应用，具备低延迟（35~70ms）、高清画质（最高 1080p+）、音频转发、录屏、虚拟显示器等丰富功能，跨平台支持 Linux、Windows 和 macOS。
summary.en: scrcpy is a lightweight, high-performance open-source tool that mirrors Android device screens to a computer via USB or Wi-Fi, enabling control via keyboard and mouse. It requires no root or app installation, offering low latency (35–70ms), high-quality video (up to 1080p+), audio forwarding, recording, virtual displays, and cross-platform support for Linux, Windows, and macOS.

metadata.name: xiaoju-survey
metadata.description: XIAOJUSURVEY is an enterprises form builder and analytics platform that allows users to create questionnaires, exams, polls, quizzes, and analyze data online.

summary.zh: XIAOJUSURVEY 是滴滴开源的企业级表单构建与数据分析平台，支持问卷、考试、测评等多场景创建，提供40+题型、100+模板及AI生成能力。基于Vue3+NestJS+MongoDB架构，具备高一致性渲染、题型物料化设计、安全合规等特性，适用于市场调研、客户满意度分析等线上调研需求。
summary.en: XIAOJUSURVEY is DiDi's open-source enterprise form builder and analytics platform, enabling creation of surveys, exams, and quizzes with 40+ question types and 100+ templates. Built on Vue3 + NestJS + MongoDB, it features AI-powered generation, consistent rendering, modular question design, and robust security, ideal for market research and data analysis.

metadata.name: gpt-engineer
metadata.description: CLI platform to experiment with codegen. Precursor to: https://lovable.dev

summary.zh: gpt-engineer 是一个基于自然语言生成代码的命令行实验平台，用户可通过描述需求让 AI 自动编写并执行代码，支持代码改进与自定义代理基准测试。作为 lovable.dev 的前身，它聚焦于灵活、可定制的代码生成流程，适用于快速原型开发与 AI 编程研究。
summary.en: gpt-engineer is a CLI platform for experimenting with AI-driven code generation. Users describe software in natural language, and the AI writes and executes code accordingly. It supports code improvement, custom agent benchmarking (e.g., APPS, MBPP), and serves as the precursor to lovable.dev, ideal for prototyping and AI coding research.

metadata.name: tailwind-nextjs-starter-blog
metadata.description: This is a Next.js, Tailwind CSS blogging starter template. Comes out of the box configured with the latest technologies to make technical writing a breeze. Easily configurable and customizable. Perfect as a replacement to existing Jekyll and Hugo individual blogs.

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Next.js 和 Tailwind CSS 的博客启动模板，采用 App 目录与 React Server Components 架构，集成 Contentlayer 实现 Markdown 内容管理。支持快速部署至 Vercel，提供丰富的功能与高度可定制性，是替代 Jekyll 和 Hugo 等静态博客的理想选择。
summary.en: A feature-rich Next.js and Tailwind CSS blogging starter template using the App Router and React Server Components. It leverages Contentlayer for Markdown content management, offers easy customization, and is ideal for replacing Jekyll or Hugo blogs with modern tooling.

metadata.name: wenyan
metadata.description: 文颜- Markdown文章排版美化工具，支持微信公众号、今日头条、知乎等平台。

summary.zh: 文颜是一款专为内容创作者设计的Markdown排版与多平台发布工具，支持一键转换并发布至微信公众号、知乎、今日头条等平台。具备主题美化、图片上传、数学公式、代码高亮、自定义样式及导出长图等功能，旨在让作者专注内容创作，无需操心排版适配。
summary.en: Wenyan is a Markdown formatting and multi-platform publishing tool designed for content creators. It supports one-click conversion and publishing to platforms like WeChat, Zhihu, and Jinri Toutiao. Features include theme styling, image upload, MathJax support, syntax highlighting, custom themes, and long image export, enabling writers to focus on content rather than formatting.

metadata.name: NGCBot
metadata.description: 一个基于✨HOOK机制的微信机器人，支持🌱安全新闻定时推送【FreeBuf，先知，安全客，奇安信攻防社区】，👯Kfc文案，⚡漏洞查询，⚡手机号归属地查询，⚡知识库查询，🎉星座查询，⚡天气查询，🌱摸鱼日历，⚡微步威胁情报查询， 🐛视频，⚡图片，👯帮助菜单。📫 支持积分功能，⚡支持自动拉人，，🌱自动群发，👯Ai回复（国内主流AI模型，扣子，FastGpt，Dify全面支持！），⚡视频号解析，😄自定义程度丰富，小白也可轻松上手！

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于HOOK机制的微信机器人，集成安全资讯推送、漏洞查询、AI对话、威胁情报等实用功能，支持多种主流AI模型接入，具备自动拉人、群发、积分系统等扩展能力，自定义程度高，适合安全爱好者与运营人员使用。
summary.en: This project is a WeChat bot based on HOOK mechanism, featuring security news推送, vulnerability lookup, AI chat, threat intelligence, and more. It supports mainstream AI models, auto-invite, group messaging, point system, and high customizability for security enthusiasts and operators.

metadata.name: awesome-LLM-resources
metadata.description: 🧑‍🚀 全世界最好的LLM资料总结（多模态生成、Agent、辅助编程、AI审稿、数据处理、模型训练、模型推理、o1 模型、MCP、小语言模型、视觉语言模型） | Summary of the world's best LLM resources.

summary.zh: 该项目是全面的大语言模型（LLM）资源汇总，涵盖多模态生成、智能体、模型训练与推理、RAG、MCP、小模型等前沿方向，提供从数据获取、微调、评估到实际应用的完整技术栈资料，持续更新，助力开发者系统掌握LLM生态。
summary.en: This repository offers a comprehensive collection of top-tier LLM resources, covering multimodal generation, agents, fine-tuning, inference, RAG, MCP, small language models, and more. It provides up-to-date materials across the full LLM lifecycle, from data processing to deployment, serving as a vital guide for developers.

metadata.name: LSPosed
metadata.description: LSPosed Framework resuscitated

summary.zh: LSPosed 是一款基于 Zygisk 的 ART 运行时钩子框架，旨在复活并延续 Xposed 框架的功能。它通过 LSPlant 实现高效稳定的方法 Hook，兼容原版 Xposed API，支持 Android 8.1 至 16，适用于 Magisk 环境下的系统与应用行为修改，无需修改 APK 即可实现模块化管理。
summary.en: LSPosed is a Zygisk-based ART hooking framework that revives the Xposed functionality. It leverages LSPlant for stable method hooking, maintains full compatibility with original Xposed APIs, and supports Android 8.1–16. Designed for Magisk, it enables non-invasive system and app modifications through modular hooks without altering APKs.

metadata.name: clash-party
metadata.description: :electron: Another Mihomo GUI.

summary.zh: Clash Party 是一款基于 Electron 开发的 Mihomo（Clash Meta）图形界面客户端，提供开箱即用的代理管理体验。支持智能内核切换、AI 驱动节点优选、多主题 UI、WebDAV 配置同步及 Sub-Store 深度集成，无需 Tun 模式即可运行，适合追求高效稳定代理的用户。
summary.en: Clash Party is an Electron-based GUI client for Mihomo (Clash Meta), offering out-of-the-box proxy management. It features smart core switching, AI-powered node selection, multi-theme UI, WebDAV config sync, and deep Sub-Store integration, running without Tun mode for a streamlined experience.

metadata.name: docling
metadata.description: Get your documents ready for gen AI

summary.zh: Docling 是一款专为生成式 AI 设计的文档处理工具，支持 PDF、DOCX、PPTX、HTML、音频、图像等 20+ 格式解析，具备高级 PDF 理解能力（如布局分析、表格结构、公式识别），提供统一的 DoclingDocument 数据模型，支持 Markdown、JSON 等多种导出格式，并集成 LangChain、LlamaIndex 等主流 AI 框架，适用于敏感数据本地化处理场景。
summary.en: Docling is a document processing toolkit tailored for generative AI, supporting parsing of 20+ formats including PDF, DOCX, PPTX, HTML, audio, and images. It offers advanced PDF understanding (layout, tables, formulas), a unified DoclingDocument model, multiple export formats (Markdown, JSON), and seamless integrations with LangChain, LlamaIndex, and agentic AI frameworks, enabling secure local execution.

metadata.name: figura
metadata.description: A free macOS native app to remove image backgrounds locally

summary.zh: Figura 是一款免费原生的 macOS 应用，专为快速移除图像背景而设计。它基于 SwiftUI 和 Vision 框架开发，利用 macOS 14+ 原生背景移除功能，提供一键式操作、拖拽上传、深色/浅色模式支持，界面简洁现代，性能高效，适合本地隐私处理需求。
summary.en: Figura is a free, native macOS app for fast background removal from images. Built with SwiftUI and Apple's Vision framework, it leverages macOS 14+ native capabilities to deliver one-click processing, drag-and-drop input, and dark/light mode support—offering a sleek, privacy-focused experience.

metadata.name: maxun
metadata.description: 🔥 The open-source no-code platform for web scraping, crawling, search and AI data extraction • Turn websites into structured APIs in minutes 🔥

summary.zh: Maxun 是一个开源的无代码平台，专注于将任意网站转化为结构化 API，支持网页抓取、爬虫、搜索和 AI 数据提取。提供录制模式与 AI 自然语言指令两种方式，实现高效、可扩展的自动化数据采集，适用于从简单任务到复杂工作流的多种场景。
summary.en: Maxun is an open-source no-code platform that transforms any website into a structured API, enabling real-time web scraping, crawling, search, and AI-powered data extraction. It offers recorder and AI modes for intuitive, scalable data automation across diverse use cases.

metadata.name: MinerU
metadata.description: Transforms complex documents like PDFs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.

summary.zh: MinerU 是一款将复杂 PDF 文档智能转换为 LLM 友好格式（Markdown/JSON）的开源工具，专为 Agentic 工作流设计，支持表格、公式、图片等结构化内容提取，提升大模型处理文档的准确性与效率。
summary.en: MinerU is an open-source tool that intelligently converts complex PDFs into LLM-ready formats like Markdown and JSON, designed for agentic workflows. It extracts structured content such as tables, formulas, and images to enhance accuracy and efficiency in large language model processing.

metadata.name: html-to-markdown
metadata.description: ⚙️ Convert HTML to Markdown. Even works with entire websites and can be extended through rules.

summary.zh: 一个功能强大的 HTML 转 Markdown 工具，支持将整个网页转换为结构清晰的 Markdown，具备粗体、斜体、列表、代码块、表格等完整格式处理能力，并提供 Go 语言库、CLI、在线演示和 REST API 多种使用方式，支持插件扩展与自定义规则。
summary.en: A robust HTML-to-Markdown converter that transforms HTML—including full websites—into clean, readable Markdown. It supports rich formatting like bold, italic, lists, code blocks, tables, and offers a Go library, CLI, online demo, and REST API, with extensible plugin support.

metadata.name: text-extract-api
metadata.description: Document (PDF, Word, PPTX ...) extraction and parse API using state of the art modern OCRs + Ollama supported models. Anonymize documents. Remove PII. Convert any document or picture to structured JSON or Markdown

summary.zh: text-extract-api 是一个基于 FastAPI 构建的文档提取与解析 API，支持 PDF、Word、PPTX 等格式转换为高精度 Markdown 或结构化 JSON。集成 EasyOCR、Ollama 模型（如 llama3.2-vision）及 marker-pdf 等先进 OCR 技术，具备 PII 匿名化、分布式任务处理（Celery）、Redis 缓存及多存储策略功能，完全本地化运行，无外部依赖。
summary.en: text-extract-api is a FastAPI-based document extraction and parsing API that converts PDFs, Word, PPTX, and images into high-accuracy Markdown or structured JSON. It leverages state-of-the-art OCR engines like EasyOCR, Ollama models (e.g., llama3.2-vision), and marker-pdf, with features including PII removal, Celery-based async processing, Redis caching, and local-only operation without cloud dependencies.

metadata.name: memfree
metadata.description: MemFree - Hybrid AI Search Engine & AI Page Generator

summary.zh: MemFree 是一款混合式 AI 搜索引擎与 AI 页面生成器，集成 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 等主流大模型，支持多模态输入（文本、图像、文件）和跨设备同步，可快速从本地知识库与全网获取精准答案，并一键生成生产级 React + Tailwind UI 页面，显著提升信息检索与前端开发效率。
summary.en: MemFree is a hybrid AI search engine and AI page generator that leverages top models like Claude 3.5 Sonnet to deliver accurate answers from both personal knowledge bases and the web. It supports multimodal inputs, cross-device sync, and instantly generates production-ready UI pages using React, Tailwind, and Shadcn UI, streamlining research and frontend development.

metadata.name: DreamClear
metadata.description: [NeurIPS 2024] DreamClear: High-Capacity Real-World Image Restoration with Privacy-Safe Dataset Curation

summary.zh: DreamClear 是一种高容量真实世界图像恢复方法，结合隐私安全的数据集构建策略，在 NeurIPS 2024 发表。其核心创新在于利用 LLaVA 进行语义引导的图像修复，并通过自动化流程构建高质量、隐私合规的训练数据，显著提升复杂退化场景下的恢复效果。
summary.en: DreamClear is a high-capacity real-world image restoration framework presented at NeurIPS 2024, featuring privacy-safe dataset curation. It leverages LLaVA for semantic-aware restoration and automates the creation of high-quality, privacy-compliant training data, achieving superior performance on complex real-world degradations.

metadata.name: wx_channels_download
metadata.description: 微信视频号下载器

summary.zh: 微信视频号下载器是一款轻量级工具，支持 macOS 和 Windows 系统，通过本地代理服务自动安装证书并注入下载按钮，用户可在微信 PC 端直接下载视频号内容，支持多清晰度选择，适用于技术研究与个人备份。
summary.en: A lightweight WeChat Channels video downloader for macOS and Windows. It runs a local proxy to auto-install certificates and injects a download button into the WeChat desktop client, enabling direct video downloads with multiple quality options, intended for technical research and personal use.

metadata.name: AsrTools
metadata.description: ✨ AsrTools: Smart Voice-to-Text Tool | Efficient Batch Processing | User-Friendly Interface | No GPU Required | Supports SRT/TXT Output | Turn your audio into accurate text in an instant!

summary.zh: AsrTools 是一款无需 GPU、开箱即用的智能语音转文字工具，支持批量处理音频与视频文件，基于 PyQt5 和 qfluentwidgets 提供美观易用的图形界面。可输出 SRT、TXT、ASS 等字幕格式，具备多线程并发处理能力，适合快速生成高质量字幕。
summary.en: AsrTools is a GPU-free, user-friendly speech-to-text tool with batch processing support for audio and video files. Built with PyQt5 and qfluentwidgets, it offers a sleek GUI and outputs subtitles in SRT, TXT, and ASS formats using multithreaded processing for fast, accurate transcription.

metadata.name: ChatGPT-On-CS
metadata.description: 基于大模型的智能对话客服工具，支持微信、拼多多、千牛、哔哩哔哩、抖音企业号、抖音、抖店、微博聊天、小红书专业号运营、小红书、知乎等平台接入，可选择 GPT3.5/GPT4.0/ 懒人百宝箱 （后续会支持更多平台），能处理文本、语音和图片，通过插件访问操作系统和互联网等外部资源，支持基于自有知识库定制企业 AI 应用。

summary.zh: 基于大语言模型的电商智能客服SaaS平台，支持微信、抖音、千牛、小红书等主流平台接入，集成GPT3.5/4.0、通义千问等模型，具备文本、语音、图片处理能力，支持知识库定制与插件扩展，提供多平台统一管理、智能问答、数据分析等功能，专为电商场景优化。
summary.en: An AI-powered customer service SaaS platform for e-commerce, integrating major LLMs like GPT-3.5/4.0 and Tongyi Qianwen. It supports multi-platform access (WeChat, Douyin, Qianniu, Xiaohongshu, etc.), handles text, voice, and images, enables custom knowledge bases and plugin extensions, and offers unified management, intelligent Q&A, and data analytics tailored for e-commerce.

metadata.name: paper-ai
metadata.description: 搜索真实文献并生成引用对应文献的AI论文

summary.zh: paper-ai 是一款基于人工智能的论文写作工具，支持通过关键词在 Semantic Scholar、arXiv 和 PubMed 中检索真实文献，并自动生成带引用的学术内容。用户可借助 AI 对话获取写作建议，并在内置编辑器中直接修改文本样式与结构，极大提升科研写作效率。
summary.en: paper-ai is an AI-powered academic writing tool that searches real papers from Semantic Scholar, arXiv, and PubMed using keywords, then generates properly cited content. It features AI-assisted writing via interactive chat and an in-app editor for real-time text editing and formatting, streamlining the research writing process.

metadata.name: mihomo
metadata.description: A simple Python Pydantic model for Honkai: Star Rail parsed data from the Mihomo API.

summary.zh: mihomo 是一个基于 Pydantic 的 Python 库，用于解析《崩坏：星穹铁道》的 Mihomo API 数据，提供类型提示与自动补全支持。支持 V1/V2 两种数据格式，包含角色、成就、头像等结构化信息，并提供去重、合并、持久化等实用工具。
summary.en: mihomo is a Python library using Pydantic to parse Honkai: Star Rail data from the Mihomo API, offering type hints and autocompletion. It supports both V1 and V2 data formats, includes structured character and player info, and provides utilities like deduplication, merging, and data persistence.

metadata.name: clash-nyanpasu
metadata.description: Clash Nyanpasu～(∠・ω< )⌒☆​

summary.zh: Clash Nyanpasu 是一款基于 Tauri 框架开发的 Clash 图形界面客户端，支持 Clash Premium、Mihomo 和 Clash Rust 内核。提供配置文件管理（YAML/JS/Lua）、提供者管理功能，并采用 Google Material You 设计风格，具备亮暗主题切换与流畅动画效果，适用于 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 平台。
summary.en: Clash Nyanpasu is a Tauri-based GUI client for Clash, supporting Clash Premium, Mihomo, and Clash Rust cores. It features profile management via YAML/JavaScript/Lua, provider support, and a Google Material You design with light/dark themes and smooth animations, available on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

metadata.name: clash-verge-rev
metadata.description: A modern GUI client based on Tauri, designed to run in Windows, macOS and Linux for tailored proxy experience

summary.zh: Clash Verge Rev 是一款基于 Tauri 2 和 Rust 构建的现代化跨平台代理客户端，支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux。它内置 Clash.Meta (mihomo) 内核，提供系统代理、TUN 模式、可视化规则编辑、主题定制及 WebDav 同步等功能，界面简洁美观，适合追求高性能与稳定性的用户。
summary.en: Clash Verge Rev is a modern, cross-platform proxy GUI client built with Tauri 2 and Rust, supporting Windows, macOS, and Linux. It integrates the Clash.Meta (mihomo) core, offering system proxy, TUN mode, visual rule editing, theme customization, and WebDav sync, delivering a sleek interface and high-performance proxy experience.

metadata.name: TMSpeech
metadata.description: 腾讯会议摸鱼工具

summary.zh: TMSpeech 是一款基于 sherpa-onnx 的 Windows 中文实时语音转文字工具，通过 WASAPI 捕获系统音频，实现无边框字幕展示与会议纪要自动生成。支持自定义命令行识别器，CPU 占用低，适用于腾讯会议等场景的‘摸鱼’辅助与语音记录。
summary.en: TMSpeech is a Windows-based real-time Chinese speech-to-text tool using sherpa-onnx and WASAPI loopback capture. It displays subtitles in a borderless window, auto-generates meeting transcripts, and supports custom command-line recognizers with low CPU usage—ideal for meeting assistance and voice logging.

metadata.name: UserScripts
metadata.description: 🐒一些修改自网络的油猴脚本 Some Tampermonkey scripts modified from the internet

summary.zh: 该仓库收集并修改了多个来自网络的油猴脚本（Tampermonkey），涵盖网页功能增强、自动化操作及用户体验优化等场景。脚本在 GreasyFork 上拥有高安装量和良好评分，支持多语言文档，适合中文用户提升浏览器使用效率。
summary.en: This repository collects and modifies various Tampermonkey userscripts from the internet, focusing on web enhancement, automation, and user experience improvements. With high install counts and positive ratings on GreasyFork, it supports multilingual documentation and is ideal for Chinese users seeking browser efficiency.

metadata.name: hiddify-app
metadata.description: Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

summary.zh: Hiddify 是一款基于 Sing-box 的多平台代理客户端，支持 Vless、Vmess、Reality、TUIC、Hysteria、Wireguard、SSH 等协议，具备自动节点选择、TUN 模式、远程配置订阅等功能。开源无广告，适用于 Android、iOS、Windows、macOS 和 Linux，专为伊朗、中国、俄罗斯等地区优化，提供安全私密的网络访问。
summary.en: Hiddify is a multi-platform proxy client built on Sing-box, supporting protocols like Vless, Vmess, Reality, TUIC, Hysteria, Wireguard, and SSH. It features auto node selection, TUN mode, remote profiles, and subscription updates. Open-source, ad-free, and optimized for regions like Iran, China, and Russia, it ensures secure and private internet access across Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, and Linux.

metadata.name: FlClash
metadata.description: A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

summary.zh: FlClash 是一款基于 ClashMeta 的多平台代理客户端，支持 Android、Windows、macOS 和 Linux。采用 Material You 设计，界面简洁易用，提供多种主题与深色模式，支持订阅链接和 WebDAV 数据同步，完全开源且无广告。
summary.en: FlClash is a multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta, supporting Android, Windows, macOS, and Linux. Featuring a Material You-inspired UI, it offers multiple themes, dark mode, subscription support, WebDAV sync, and is fully open-source and ad-free.

metadata.name: crawl4ai
metadata.description: 🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper. Don't be shy, join here: https://discord.gg/jP8KfhDhyN

summary.zh: Crawl4AI 是一款开源的、专为 LLM 设计的网页爬虫与数据提取工具，能将网页内容转换为干净、结构化的 Markdown 格式，适用于 RAG、AI 代理和数据管道。支持自托管、实时监控、崩溃恢复与预取加速，已被 5 万+ 星标社区验证，具备企业级稳定性与成本效益。
summary.en: Crawl4AI is an open-source, LLM-friendly web crawler and scraper that converts web content into clean, structured Markdown for RAG, AI agents, and data pipelines. It features self-hosting, real-time monitoring, crash recovery, and prefetch acceleration, battle-tested by a 50k+ star community with enterprise-grade reliability and cost-efficiency.

metadata.name: x-crawl
metadata.description: Flexible Node.js AI-assisted crawler library

summary.zh: x-crawl 是一款灵活的 Node.js AI 辅助爬虫库，集成 Ollama 与 OpenAI，支持动态/静态页面、接口及文件抓取。提供设备指纹伪装、代理轮换、优先级队列、失败重试等高级功能，结合 AI 实现智能解析，有效应对网页结构变更，提升爬虫效率与稳定性。
summary.en: x-crawl is a flexible Node.js AI-assisted crawler library integrating Ollama and OpenAI. It supports crawling dynamic/static pages, APIs, and files, with features like device fingerprinting, proxy rotation, retry logic, and priority queues. AI enhances parsing robustness against structural changes, improving efficiency and reliability.

metadata.name: open-webui
metadata.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)

summary.zh: Open WebUI 是一款用户友好的自托管 AI 平台，支持 Ollama 和 OpenAI 兼容 API，具备 RAG 推理引擎。提供免安装部署、细粒度权限管理、响应式设计、PWA 支持、Markdown/LaTeX 渲染、语音视频通话、模型构建器及原生 Python 函数调用等丰富功能，适用于离线或企业环境。
summary.en: Open WebUI is a user-friendly, self-hosted AI platform supporting Ollama and OpenAI-compatible APIs with built-in RAG inference. It offers effortless deployment, granular permissions, responsive design, PWA support, Markdown/LaTeX rendering, voice/video calls, model builder, and native Python function calling for versatile AI interactions.

metadata.name: kimi-free-api
metadata.description: 🚀 KIMI AI 长文本大模型逆向API【特长：长文本解读整理】，支持高速流式输出、智能体对话、联网搜索、探索版、K1思考模型、长文档解读、图像解析、多轮对话，零配置部署，多路token支持，自动清理会话痕迹，仅供测试，如需商用请前往官方开放平台。

summary.zh: 该项目为KIMI AI大模型的逆向免费API接口，支持长文本解读、流式输出、多轮对话、联网搜索、图像解析及智能体调用，兼容ChatGPT接口，提供Docker、Vercel等多种部署方式，适用于个人测试与研究，强调零配置与多路Token负载均衡。
summary.en: This project provides a reverse-engineered free API for KIMI AI, supporting long-text processing, streaming output, multi-turn conversations, web search, image analysis, and agent interactions. It is fully compatible with ChatGPT API and offers easy deployment via Docker, Vercel, etc., designed for personal testing and research use.

metadata.name: lew-ui
metadata.description: A beautiful component library based on vue3

summary.zh: Lew UI 是一款基于 Vue3 构建的现代化组件库，提供美观易用的 UI 组件。支持 TypeScript，集成 Tippy.js、Lucide 图标、VueUse 等开源库，具备工具提示、虚拟列表、表单验证等功能，适用于快速开发高质量前端应用。
summary.en: Lew UI is a modern component library built on Vue3, offering elegant and user-friendly UI components.
