summary.en: This repository provides a complete Chinese translation of Miguel Grinberg's 2017 Flask Mega-Tutorial, covering 23 chapters on full-stack Flask development—from templates and databases to authentication and deployment—enabling Chinese-speaking developers to master modern Flask application development.

metadata.name: mint-ui
metadata.description: Mobile UI elements for Vue.js

summary.zh: Mint UI 是饿了么前端团队开发的移动端 Vue 2.0 UI 组件库，提供丰富的移动端交互组件，支持按需引入和 babel 插件自动加载样式，适用于快速构建高性能移动 Web 应用。
summary.en: Mint UI is a mobile UI component library for Vue 2.0 developed by ElemeFE, offering rich mobile interaction components with support for modular imports and automatic CSS loading via babel-plugin-component, ideal for building high-performance mobile web apps.

metadata.name: FiraCode
metadata.description: Free monospaced font with programming ligatures

summary.zh: Fira Code 是一款免费等宽字体，专为编程设计，支持常见多字符组合的连字（ligatures），如 `->`、`<=` 等，提升代码可读性。基于 Fira Mono 开发，兼容主流编辑器，支持多种字符变体、样式集及控制台 UI 符号，适用于编程与数学写作。
summary.en: Fira Code is a free monospaced font designed for programming, featuring ligatures for common multi-character operators like `->` and `<=`. Built on Fira Mono, it enhances code readability without altering source text. It supports stylistic sets, character variants, and console UI symbols, compatible with most editors.

metadata.name: dopamine
metadata.description: Dopamine is a research framework for fast prototyping of reinforcement learning algorithms.

summary.zh: Dopamine 是谷歌推出的强化学习研究框架，专为快速原型设计而构建。它提供简洁、易理解的代码库，支持 DQN、Rainbow、SAC 等主流算法的 JAX 实现，强调实验便捷性、灵活开发与结果可复现性，适用于 Atari 和 Mujoco 环境。
summary.en: Dopamine is a research framework by Google for fast prototyping of reinforcement learning algorithms. It offers a clean, readable codebase with JAX-based implementations of key agents like DQN, Rainbow, and SAC, emphasizing ease of experimentation, flexibility, and reproducibility across Atari and Mujoco environments.

metadata.name: free-programming-books
metadata.description: :books: Freely available programming books

summary.zh: 该项目由Free Ebook Foundation维护，是一个多语言免费编程书籍资源的精选列表，涵盖从入门到高级的各类技术主题。支持在线搜索与浏览，是开发者获取高质量学习材料的权威开源项目。
summary.en: Maintained by the Free Ebook Foundation, this project is a curated list of free programming books in multiple languages, covering topics from beginner to advanced levels. It features an online searchable interface and serves as a trusted open-source resource for developers seeking quality learning materials.

metadata.name: actionview
metadata.description: An issue tracking tool based on laravel+reactjs for small and medium-sized enterprises, open-source and free, similar to Jira.

summary.zh: ActionView 是一款基于 Laravel + ReactJS 开发的开源免费问题追踪工具，专为中小企业设计，功能对标 Jira。支持敏捷开发看板、甘特图、自定义工作流、权限控制、LDAP 集成、GitLab/GitHub 联动等特性，提供清晰的代码结构和 Docker 部署方案，适合二次开发。
summary.en: ActionView is an open-source, free issue tracking tool built with Laravel (PHP) and ReactJS, targeting small to medium enterprises as a lightweight alternative to Jira. It supports agile boards, Gantt charts, custom workflows, LDAP integration, GitLab/GitHub webhooks, and offers Docker deployment with clean code for easy customization.

metadata.name: shadowsocks-android
metadata.description: A shadowsocks client for Android

summary.zh: Shadowsocks Android 客户端，基于 Kotlin 开发，支持 Android 及 Chrome OS 和 Android TV 平台。集成 shadowsocks-rust 核心，依赖 NDK 与 Rust 跨平台编译，提供高效安全的网络代理功能。项目采用 GPL-3.0 开源协议，持续维护并兼容 API 23+ 设备。
summary.en: A Kotlin-based Shadowsocks client for Android, Chrome OS, and Android TV, leveraging shadowsocks-rust core with NDK and Rust cross-compilation for secure, high-performance proxying. Supports API 23+, actively maintained under GPL-3.0 license with CI/CD integration.

metadata.name: vscode-syncing
metadata.description: :zap: Sync all of your VSCode settings across multiple devices, supports any VSCode variant.

summary.zh: Syncing 是一款 VSCode 扩展，支持通过 GitHub Gist 在多台设备间同步用户设置、快捷键、插件、代码片段等配置，兼容 VSCodium、Cursor 等 VSCode 变体，提供增量同步、排除规则与自动同步功能，确保开发环境一致性。
summary.en: Syncing is a VSCode extension that synchronizes user settings, keybindings, extensions, snippets, and locales across devices via GitHub Gist. It supports all VSCode variants like VSCodium and Cursor, with incremental sync, exclusion rules, and auto-sync for consistent development environments.

metadata.name: zsh-autosuggestions
metadata.description: Fish-like autosuggestions for zsh

summary.zh: zsh-autosuggestions 是一款为 Zsh 提供类 Fish 自动建议功能的插件，基于命令历史和补全系统实时生成建议，支持自定义高亮样式与多种建议策略（如 history、completion、match_prev_cmd），显著提升命令行输入效率。
summary.en: zsh-autosuggestions is a plugin that provides Fish-like fast and unobtrusive autosuggestions for Zsh, offering real-time command suggestions based on history and completions, with customizable highlight styles and multiple suggestion strategies to enhance terminal productivity.

metadata.name: spaceship-prompt
metadata.description: 🚀✨ Minimalistic, powerful and extremely customizable Zsh prompt

summary.zh: Spaceship Prompt 是一款极简、强大且高度可定制的 Zsh 提示符工具，专为提升终端体验而设计。它支持 Git/Mercurial 仓库状态、多语言运行时环境、Docker/Kubernetes 上下文、电池状态等丰富信息展示，兼具美观与实用性，适用于开发者日常高效工作流。
summary.en: Spaceship Prompt is a minimalistic, powerful, and highly customizable Zsh prompt designed to enhance terminal experience. It displays rich contextual information such as Git/Mercurial status, runtime environments for multiple languages, Docker/Kubernetes context, battery level, and more—combining aesthetics with developer productivity.

metadata.name: hiper
metadata.description: 🚀 A statistical analysis tool for performance testing

summary.zh: Hiper 是一款用于性能测试的统计分析工具，基于 Chrome 浏览器自动化技术，支持多次加载目标网页并采集 PerformanceTiming 数据，提供 DNS、TCP、TTFB、DOM 加载等关键指标分析，适用于前端性能监控与优化。
summary.en: Hiper is a statistical analysis tool for performance testing that automates Chrome to load web pages multiple times and collects PerformanceTiming metrics, including DNS, TCP, TTFB, and DOM load times, ideal for frontend performance monitoring and optimization.

metadata.name: AndroidDevTools
metadata.description: 收集整理Android开发所需的Android SDK、开发中用到的工具、Android开发教程、Android设计规范，免费的设计素材等。

summary.zh: 该项目是一个全面的Android开发资源聚合平台，涵盖Android SDK、开发工具、教程、设计规范及免费素材。提供从环境搭建到代码生成、调试测试、UI设计的一站式工具链支持，助力开发者高效构建高质量Android应用。
summary.en: This project is a comprehensive collection of Android development resources, including SDKs, tools, tutorials, design guidelines, and free assets. It offers a one-stop toolchain for environment setup, code generation, debugging, testing, and UI design to help developers build high-quality Android apps efficiently.

metadata.name: alfred-workflows
metadata.description: :metal: A collection of Alfred 3 and 4 workflows that will rock your world

summary.zh: 这是一个为 Alfred 3 和 4 精心整理的强大工作流集合，涵盖防止休眠、浏览器兼容性查询、颜色格式转换、DevDocs 文档搜索、域名查询及 Emoji 搜索等功能，极大提升 macOS 用户效率。
summary.en: A curated collection of powerful Alfred 3 and 4 workflows for macOS, including caffeinate, browser compatibility checks, color conversion, DevDocs search, domain lookup, and emoji search to boost productivity.

metadata.name: yu-writer.site
metadata.description: A feature-rich, efficient text editor - Web Site

summary.zh: Yu Writer 是一款功能丰富且高效的文本编辑器，其官网项目展示了编辑器的核心特性与用户界面设计。尽管当前仓库暂停更新，但仍可作为了解该编辑器理念和前端实现的参考。
summary.en: Yu Writer is a feature-rich and efficient text editor, with this repository hosting its official website showcasing core functionalities and UI design. Although updates are paused, it remains a reference for the editor's concept and frontend implementation.

metadata.name: proxyee-down
metadata.description: http下载工具，基于http代理，支持多连接分块下载

summary.zh: Proxyee Down 是一款基于 Java 和 Netty 开发的开源 HTTP 高速下载器，支持多连接分块下载与自定义请求，通过 HTTP 代理实现高效下载。项目已暂停维护，作者正用 Go + Flutter 重构为跨平台轻量下载器 Gopeed。
summary.en: Proxyee Down is an open-source HTTP high-speed downloader built with Java and Netty, supporting multi-connection chunked downloads and custom requests via HTTP proxy. The project is no longer maintained; the author is rebuilding it as a cross-platform lightweight downloader, Gopeed, using Go and Flutter.

metadata.name: Aria2
metadata.description: 突破百度云限速合集，另外附带Baidu-Go、Tampermonkey、Proxyee-down教程。从此云端女友从不断线，有了这个它，忘掉那个她!

summary.zh: 该项目整合了Aria2下载工具及其多种图形界面（如webui-aria2、YAAW），并集成BaiduPCS-Go、Tampermonkey脚本及Proxyee-down等工具，旨在突破百度网盘限速，实现高速下载。支持Chrome插件扩展、Mac端适配及常见问题解决方案，适用于追求高效云端资源获取的用户。
summary.en: This repo integrates Aria2 with multiple GUIs (e.g., webui-aria2, YAAW) and tools like BaiduPCS-Go, Tampermonkey scripts, and Proxyee-down to bypass Baidu Cloud's speed limits. It supports Chrome extensions, macOS compatibility, and troubleshooting guides, ideal for users seeking high-speed cloud downloads.

metadata.name: shadowsocks-rss
metadata.description: ShadowsocksR update rss, SSR organization https://github.com/shadowsocksr

summary.zh: ShadowsocksR C# 版本4.8.0 是一款支持多协议代理的跨平台客户端，具备节点统计、连接管理、UDP over TCP封装、多重代理及自定义协议插件等高级功能。支持通过订阅自动更新节点，强调安全签名校验机制，适用于需要稳定、灵活代理解决方案的用户。
summary.en: ShadowsocksR C# v4.8.0 is a cross-platform proxy client supporting multiple protocols with advanced features like node statistics, connection management, UDP over TCP, multi-hop proxying, and custom protocol plugins. It supports auto-updating via server subscriptions and emphasizes secure GPG signature verification for integrity.

metadata.name: hexo-theme-next
metadata.description: Elegant and powerful theme for Hexo.

summary.zh: NexT 是一款高质量、优雅的 Hexo 主题，专为追求简洁与功能性的博客设计。支持多种布局风格（如 Muse、Mist、Pisces、Gemini），集成 PJAX、CDN 加速、第三方插件等高级特性，配置灵活，文档完善，适合技术写作者和开发者使用。
summary.en: NexT is a high-quality, elegant theme for Hexo, designed for bloggers who value simplicity and functionality. It offers multiple layout schemes (Muse, Mist, Pisces, Gemini), supports advanced features like PJAX, CDN integration, and third-party plugins, with flexible configuration and comprehensive documentation.

metadata.name: ShadowsocksX-NG
metadata.description: Next Generation of ShadowsocksX https://github.com/shadowsocks/shadowsocks-iOS

summary.zh: ShadowsocksX-NG 是 ShadowsocksX 的下一代版本，专为 macOS 平台设计，提供高效、安全的网络代理功能。该项目因监管原因已移除，原用于绕过网络审查，支持多种加密协议，界面简洁易用。
summary.en: ShadowsocksX-NG is the next-generation version of ShadowsocksX, designed for macOS to provide efficient and secure network proxying. The project has been removed due to regulatory reasons; it originally supported bypassing internet censorship with multiple encryption protocols and a clean UI.

summary.zh: ShadowsocksR for Windows 是一款基于 .NET 的图形化代理客户端，支持多服务器配置、系统代理与 PAC 规则管理，兼容 Windows 7 及以上系统。提供 .NET 2.0/4.0 双版本，集成 GFWList 自动更新与签名验证机制，适用于突破网络封锁。
summary.en: ShadowsocksR for Windows is a .NET-based GUI proxy client supporting multi-server setup, system proxy, and PAC rule management. Compatible with Windows 7+, it offers .NET 2.0/4.0 builds, integrates GFWList auto-update and signature verification, designed for bypassing internet censorship.

metadata.name: VirtualXposed
metadata.description: A simple app to use Xposed without root, unlock the bootloader or modify system image, etc.

summary.zh: VirtualXposed 是一款基于 VirtualApp 和 epic 的非 root 环境下运行 Xposed 模块的安卓应用，支持 Android 5.0~10.0。用户可在虚拟环境中安装应用与模块，无需解锁 Bootloader 或修改系统镜像。适用于模块测试与免 root 功能扩展，但不支持系统级修改和资源钩子类模块。
summary.en: VirtualXposed is an Android app based on VirtualApp and epic that enables running Xposed modules without root, bootloader unlock, or system image modification. It supports Android 5.0–10.0 by creating a virtual environment for apps and modules. Ideal for testing and non-root customization, though system-modifying and resource-hooking modules are unsupported.

metadata.name: TensorFlow-Examples
metadata.description: TensorFlow Tutorial and Examples for Beginners (support TF v1 & v2)

summary.zh: 本仓库为 TensorFlow 初学者提供清晰易懂的教程与示例，涵盖从基础操作到神经网络（如 CNN、RNN、Word2Vec）的完整实践，支持 TF v1 和 v2，包含 Jupyter Notebook 与源码，强调最新 API 用法（如 layers、estimator、dataset），适合快速入门与对比学习。
summary.en: This repository offers beginner-friendly TensorFlow tutorials and examples, covering basics to advanced neural networks (CNN, RNN, Word2Vec), with support for both TF v1 and v2. It includes Jupyter notebooks and source code, emphasizing modern APIs like layers, estimator, and dataset for clear, practical learning.

metadata.name: DOClever
metadata.description: 做最好的接口管理平台

summary.zh: DOClever 是一款专为中小型团队设计的免费开源接口管理平台，支持接口编辑、调试、Mock、自动化测试及团队协作。提供多协议支持、参数可视化编辑、版本快照、Postman/Swagger导入导出等功能，支持内网部署，保障数据安全，实现接口全生命周期一体化管理。
summary.en: DOClever is a free, open-source API management platform tailored for small to medium teams. It supports API editing, debugging, mocking, automated testing, and team collaboration. Features include multi-protocol support, visual parameter editing, version snapshots, Postman/Swagger import/export, and secure on-premise deployment for full API lifecycle management.

metadata.name: PerfectWindows
metadata.description: Power Keys - 解放 Windows 和 macOS 使用效率

summary.zh: Power Keys 是一款旨在提升 Windows 和 macOS 系统操作效率的工具，通过设计清晰、无冲突的快捷键体系，优化用户日常操作体验，实现跨平台的快捷键统一管理，提升生产力。
summary.en: Power Keys enhances efficiency on Windows and macOS by providing a clean, conflict-free shortcut key system. It streamlines daily operations with unified cross-platform shortcuts, boosting productivity through intuitive keyboard workflows.

metadata.name: go-best-practice
metadata.description: Trying to complete over 100 projects in various categories in golang.

summary.zh: 《Go实战开发》是一本基于实践项目的Go语言学习指南，灵感源自经典编程练习项目集合。作者计划通过100多个涵盖多领域的实际项目，帮助开发者掌握Go语言实战技能。书中内容采用CC BY-SA 3.0许可，代码遵循BSD 3-Clause协议，支持社区交流与捐赠。
summary.en: Go实战开发 is a practical guide inspired by hands-on programming projects, aiming to teach Go through over 100 real-world examples across various domains. It adopts CC BY-SA 3.0 for content and BSD 3-Clause for code, encouraging community engagement and donations.

metadata.name: blog
metadata.description: 个人博客

summary.zh: 该仓库是个人技术博客，系统归档了算法、数据结构、计算机基础、分布式系统（MIT 6.824）、Go、PHP、Pulsar 消息队列及自研库设计等内容，涵盖从底层原理到工程实践的技术笔记与学习总结。
summary.en: This repository is a personal technical blog, systematically archiving articles on algorithms, data structures, computer fundamentals, distributed systems (MIT 6.824), Go, PHP, Pulsar MQ, and custom library designs, covering technical notes and learning summaries from core principles to engineering practices.

metadata.name: SQLAdvisor
metadata.description: 输入SQL，输出索引优化建议

summary.zh: SQLAdvisor 是美团点评DBA团队开发的SQL索引优化工具，基于MySQL原生词法解析，分析SQL中的where条件、聚合及多表Join关系，自动生成索引优化建议。已在公司内部广泛应用，开源版本与内部保持一致，支持快速集成与问题反馈。
summary.en: SQLAdvisor is a SQL index optimization tool developed by Meituan-Dianping's DBA team. It leverages MySQL's native lexical parsing to analyze WHERE clauses, aggregations, and multi-table JOINs, generating actionable index recommendations. Widely used internally, its open-source version mirrors the internal release.

metadata.name: homebrew-cask-upgrade
metadata.description: A command line tool for upgrading every outdated app installed by Homebrew Cask

summary.zh: `brew-cask-upgrade` 是一款用于批量升级 Homebrew Cask 安装应用的命令行工具，支持交互式操作、选择性升级、版本锁定及清理缓存等功能。相比原生命令，提供更友好的界面与更高灵活性，适用于 macOS 用户高效管理 GUI 应用更新。
summary.en: `brew-cask-upgrade` is a CLI tool that upgrades all outdated apps installed via Homebrew Cask. It enhances the native upgrade process with interactivity, selective updates, version pinning, and cleanup options, offering a more user-friendly and flexible experience for managing macOS GUI applications.

metadata.name: synergy-stable-builds
metadata.description: Downloads : https://brahma-dev.github.io/synergy-stable-builds/

summary.zh: Synergy 是一款免费开源的跨平台键鼠共享工具，支持在多台计算机间无缝共用一套鼠标和键盘。项目提供稳定版本下载，编译使用 'hm conf' 和 'hm build' 命令，适用于 Linux、Mac 等平台，适合开发者和多设备用户提升工作效率。
summary.en: Synergy is a free and open-source cross-platform tool that allows sharing a single mouse and keyboard across multiple computers. It offers stable builds for download and uses 'hm conf' and 'hm build' for compilation on Linux and Mac, ideal for developers and multi-device users.

metadata.name: MacAssistant
metadata.description: Google Assistant for macOS!

summary.zh: MacAssistant 是一款将 Google Assistant 集成到 macOS 的开源项目，基于 Google Assistant SDK 和 Swift 4.2 开发。用户可通过语音或文本查询天气、日程、百科等信息，需自行配置 Google OAuth 凭证。项目处于 Beta 阶段，支持本地构建与扩展。
summary.en: MacAssistant is an open-source project that integrates Google Assistant into macOS using the Google Assistant SDK and Swift 4.2. It enables voice and text queries for weather, calendars, and general knowledge. Users must provide their own Google OAuth credentials. The project is currently in Beta and supports local building and customization.

metadata.name: awesome-mac
metadata.description:  This project is dedicated to collecting high-quality macOS software and organizing them systematically by different categories for easy search and use.

summary.zh: 该项目是一个精选的 macOS 优质软件集合，按类别整理，涵盖开发工具、效率应用、设计工具等。支持多语言文档，标注开源、免费及 App Store 链接，方便用户快速发现高质量 Mac 应用。
summary.en: A curated collection of premium macOS software organized by categories, including development tools, productivity apps, and design utilities. Features multilingual support, open-source and freeware labels, and direct App Store links for easy discovery.

metadata.name: tmt-workflow
metadata.description: A web developer workflow used by WeChat team based on Gulp, with cross-platform supported and solutions prepared.

summary.zh: tmt-workflow 是腾讯微信团队基于 Gulp 构建的前端自动化工作流，支持跨平台开发，集成 CSS 预处理、雪碧图合成、Retina 适配、JS 压缩、LiveReload 等全流程功能，并提供 rem 适配、WebP 优化、SVG 方案等完整解决方案。项目已迁移至 Feflow。
summary.en: tmt-workflow is a Gulp-based frontend automation workflow developed by Tencent's WeChat team, supporting cross-platform development with features like CSS preprocessing, sprite generation, Retina support, JS minification, and LiveReload. It also includes solutions for rem adaptation, WebP optimization, and SVG handling. The project has been migrated to Feflow.

metadata.name: WeChatTweak
metadata.description: A command-line tool for tweaking WeChat - 首款微信 macOS 客户端撤回拦截与多开 🔨

summary.zh: WeChatTweak 是一款专为 macOS 微信客户端设计的命令行工具，支持消息撤回拦截、阻止自动更新及多开功能。通过 Homebrew 安装，使用简单高效，适用于希望增强微信隐私控制与多任务处理能力的用户。
summary.en: WeChatTweak is a command-line tool for macOS WeChat that enables message recall prevention, blocks auto-updates, and supports multi-instance launching. Installed via Homebrew, it offers enhanced privacy and productivity for advanced users.

metadata.name: WeChatPlugin-MacOS
metadata.description: 微信小助手

summary.zh: 该项目为 macOS 平台微信的插件工具，提供消息防撤回、多开、自动回复等增强功能，基于逆向工程与注入技术实现，提升用户使用效率与体验。
summary.en: A macOS plugin for WeChat offering enhanced features like anti-recall, multi-instance support, and auto-reply, implemented via reverse engineering and code injection to improve user productivity.

metadata.name: Aerial
metadata.description: Apple TV Aerial Screensaver for Mac

summary.zh: Aerial 是一款适用于 macOS 10.12 及以上系统的屏保程序，复刻 Apple TV 的空中视角视频体验，展示全球多地航拍美景。支持多语言视频描述、天气信息叠加（基于 OpenWeather），并兼容 Apple Silicon。项目开源，鼓励社区贡献翻译与功能开发。
summary.en: Aerial is a macOS screensaver (10.12+) replicating Apple TV's aerial views, showcasing stunning drone footage from cities and landscapes worldwide. It supports multilingual video descriptions, real-time weather overlays via OpenWeather, and native Apple Silicon compatibility. Fully open source with active community contributions.

metadata.name: easy-mock
metadata.description: A persistent service that generates mock data quickly and provids visualization view.

summary.zh: Easy Mock 是一个可持久化的 Mock 数据生成服务，支持快速创建 RESTful API 模拟接口，提供可视化编辑界面，兼容 Swagger/OpenAPI 规范，集成 Mock.js 实现灵活数据模拟，并支持团队协作与 API 代理功能。
summary.en: Easy Mock is a persistent mock data service that rapidly generates RESTful APIs with a visual editor. It supports Swagger/OpenAPI specs, integrates Mock.js for flexible data simulation, enables team collaboration, and offers API proxying capabilities.

metadata.name: ShadowsocksX-NG
metadata.description: Next Generation of ShadowsocksX

summary.zh: ShadowsocksX-NG 是 ShadowsocksX 的下一代 macOS 客户端，采用 Swift 重构 GUI，通过 launchd 后台运行 ss-local，支持 SIP003 插件、PAC 自动更新、二维码分享及 AEAD 加密，提供更稳定、易维护的代理体验。
summary.en: ShadowsocksX-NG is the next-gen macOS client for Shadowsocks, rewritten in Swift with a cleaner architecture. It runs ss-local via launchd, supports SIP003 plugins, PAC auto-update, QR code sharing, and AEAD ciphers, offering a more maintainable and stable proxy solution.

metadata.name: kafka-python
metadata.description: Python client for Apache Kafka

summary.zh: kafka-python 是一个功能完整的 Apache Kafka 的 Python 客户端库，支持 Kafka 0.8 至 4.0 版本。它提供 KafkaConsumer 和 KafkaProducer 两个核心类，支持消费者组、分区分配、事务消息、消息头、序列化/反序列化等高级特性，接口设计贴近 Java 官方客户端，同时具备 Pythonic 的使用体验，适用于构建高吞吐、分布式的流处理应用。
summary.en: kafka-python is a full-featured Python client for Apache Kafka, compatible with versions 0.8 to 4.0. It provides KafkaConsumer and KafkaProducer classes with support for consumer groups, partition assignment, transactional messages, headers, and serialization. Designed to mirror the official Java client while offering Pythonic interfaces, it enables building high-throughput, distributed streaming applications.

metadata.name: wechat_jump_game
metadata.description: 微信《跳一跳》Python 辅助

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 Python 的微信《跳一跳》游戏自动化辅助工具，通过 ADB 获取手机屏幕截图，利用图像识别技术检测棋子与目标平台位置，计算跳跃距离并自动模拟按压时间完成精准跳跃，支持手动与自动两种模式，主要用于学习图像识别与自动化控制原理。
summary.en: This project is a Python-based automation assistant for WeChat's 'Jump Jump' game. It uses ADB to capture screenshots, applies image recognition to detect the player and target platform, calculates jump distance, and simulates touch duration for precise jumps. It supports both manual and automatic modes, primarily for educational purposes in image processing and automation.

metadata.name: you-get
metadata.description: :arrow_double_down: Dumb downloader that scrapes the web

summary.zh: You-Get 是一款轻量级命令行工具，用于从 YouTube、优酷、哔哩哔哩等主流网站下载视频、音频和图片。它无需浏览器或专有插件，支持流媒体播放与二进制文件抓取，强调自由软件理念，适合追求去中心化与隐私保护的用户。
summary.en: You-Get is a lightweight command-line tool for downloading videos, audios, and images from popular sites like YouTube, Youku, and Niconico. It enables direct media retrieval without browsers or proprietary plugins, supports streaming and binary downloads, and promotes free software principles.

metadata.name: lemon
metadata.description: Lemon is open source, embeddable, lightweight programming language http://www.lemon-lang.org

summary.zh: Lemon 是一种开源、可嵌入、轻量级的编程语言，适用于资源受限环境或作为宿主应用的脚本扩展。其编译器与虚拟机源码位于 src 目录，支持跨平台构建（Linux/macOS/Windows），提供 POSIX 与 Windows 兼容的系统与网络模块，适合嵌入式开发和轻量级脚本场景。
summary.en: Lemon is an open-source, embeddable, and lightweight programming language designed for resource-constrained environments or as a scripting extension in host applications. It includes a compiler and VM, supports cross-platform builds, and offers POSIX/Windows-compatible OS and socket modules for embedded and lightweight scripting use cases.

metadata.name: sentry
metadata.description: Developer-first error tracking and performance monitoring

summary.zh: Sentry 是一个面向开发者的错误追踪与性能监控平台，帮助开发者快速发现、定位并修复代码问题。支持多语言 SDK，涵盖 JavaScript、Python、Go、Java 等主流技术栈，提供实时错误报告、性能分析、会话回放等功能，广泛应用于 Web、移动端及后端服务的稳定性保障。
summary.en: Sentry is a developer-first error tracking and performance monitoring platform that enables developers to detect, trace, and resolve issues efficiently. With official SDKs for JavaScript, Python, Go, Java, and more, it offers real-time error reporting, performance insights, session replay, and uptime monitoring across web, mobile, and backend applications.

metadata.name: NeteaseCloudMusicApi
metadata.description: 网易云音乐 Node.js API service

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 Node.js 的网易云音乐 API 服务，曾提供丰富的音乐数据接口调用功能，支持歌曲搜索、歌单获取、用户信息等操作。因版权保护原因，项目已停止维护。
summary.en: This project is a Node.js-based API service for NetEase Cloud Music, formerly offering extensive music data interfaces such as song search, playlist retrieval, and user info. It has been discontinued due to copyright protection concerns.

metadata.name: weweChat
metadata.description: 💬 Unofficial WeChat client built with React, MobX and Electron.

summary.zh: weweChat 是一款基于 React、MobX 和 Electron 构建的非官方微信桌面客户端，支持 macOS 窗口动态模糊效果、消息防撤回、桌面通知、快捷键操作、拖拽发送文件、批量发送消息及 GIF 表情发送等功能，兼容 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 系统。
summary.en: weweChat is an unofficial WeChat desktop client built with React, MobX, and Electron. It features macOS window vibrancy, message recall blocking, desktop notifications, keyboard shortcuts, drag-and-drop file sending, batch messaging, and GIF emoji support, compatible with Windows, macOS, and Linux.

metadata.name: mxnet
metadata.description: Lightweight, Portable, Flexible Distributed/Mobile Deep Learning with Dynamic, Mutation-aware Dataflow Dep Scheduler; for Python, R, Julia, Scala, Go, Javascript and more

summary.zh: Apache MXNet 是一个高效且灵活的深度学习框架，支持符号式与命令式编程混合模式，具备动态依赖调度器和图优化层，实现高性能与低内存消耗。支持多语言（Python、R、Julia 等）及分布式与移动端部署，适用于大规模 GPU 训练与轻量化推理场景。
summary.en: Apache MXNet is an efficient and flexible deep learning framework supporting hybrid symbolic and imperative programming. It features a dynamic dependency scheduler and graph optimization for high performance and low memory usage. It supports multiple languages and scales across GPUs and mobile devices for distributed training and lightweight inference.

metadata.name: maptalks.js
metadata.description: A light and plugable JavaScript library for integrated 2D/3D maps.

summary.zh: maptalks-gl 是一个基于 WebGL/WebGPU 的高性能 2D/3D 地图引擎，支持矢量瓦片、3DTiles 和 GLTF 格式，提供丰富的 3D 分析功能与交通模拟动画。其轻量、模块化设计便于集成，并兼容旧版 maptalks API，支持 ESM 与 CDN 引入方式，适用于现代 Web 地图应用开发。
summary.en: maptalks-gl is a high-performance 2D/3D map engine powered by WebGL/WebGPU, supporting vector tiles, 3DTiles, and GLTF formats. It offers rich 3D analysis tools and traffic simulation animations. With a lightweight, modular design and backward-compatible API, it supports both ESM and CDN usage for modern web mapping applications.

metadata.name: ieaseMusic
metadata.description: 网易云音乐第三方

summary.zh: ieaseMusic 是一款基于 Electron 构建的网易云音乐第三方桌面客户端，采用 React、MobX 和 JSS 技术栈，提供现代化 UI 设计与跨平台支持。支持高质量音乐播放、歌词显示、桌面通知、Last.fm 同步、多平台音乐链接修复及社交分享功能，并集成 Alfred 工作流与音乐下载能力。
summary.en: ieaseMusic is a third-party desktop client for NetEase Cloud Music, built with Electron, React, MobX, and JSS. It offers a modern UI, cross-platform compatibility, FLAC audio support, desktop notifications, Last.fm scrobbling, dead link fixes, social sharing, WeChat login, music downloading, and Alfred workflow integration.

metadata.name: Resume-template-for-Coder
metadata.description: Resume template for Coder 适合程序员的简历模板 🎉

summary.zh: 专为程序员设计的简历模板，提供多版本中英文样式，基于 Sketch 制作，支持导出 PDF，简洁专业，适合技术岗位求职使用。
summary.en: A resume template specifically designed for coders, offering multiple versions in both English and Chinese, created with Sketch, and supports PDF export for professional job applications.

metadata.name: English-level-up-tips
metadata.description: An advanced guide to learn English which might benefit you a lot 🎉 .  离谱的英语学习指南/英语学习教程/英语学习/学英语

summary.zh: 本项目是一份系统性的英语学习进阶指南，结合作者个人高效学习经验与科学方法，涵盖听说读写词汇及AI辅助学习等模块，旨在帮助学习者建立自然习得英语的路径。内容结构清晰，配有CEFR等级参考，适合希望提升英语综合能力的学习者。
summary.en: This project is a comprehensive English learning guide that integrates the author's personal high-efficiency learning strategies with scientific methods. It covers listening, speaking, reading, writing, vocabulary, and AI-assisted learning, aiming to help learners acquire English naturally. Structured with CEFR level references, it suits those seeking holistic English improvement.

metadata.name: blog
metadata.description: A super blog lite -- just one page. use vue with github api !

summary.zh: 一个极简的单页博客系统，基于 Vue 框架并利用 GitHub Issues 作为内容存储，通过 GitHub API 实现文章管理。用户只需 Fork 项目并配置 GitHub 用户名与仓库即可部署到 GitHub Pages，支持 CI/CD 自动化构建。
summary.en: A minimalist single-page blog built with Vue, using GitHub Issues as a content backend via the GitHub API. Users can deploy it to GitHub Pages by forking the repo and configuring their GitHub username and repository, with optional CI/CD support.

metadata.name: coeditor
metadata.description: Yet Another Pair Programming Package for Atom.

summary.zh: Coeditor 是一个为 Atom 编辑器设计的实时协作编程插件，基于 ShareDB 和 OT 算法实现无冲突文本编辑，支持多人同步编辑、光标高亮、文件操作同步及项目感知。需配合 Node.js 服务器使用，适用于远程结对编程场景。
summary.en: Coeditor is a real-time collaborative programming plugin for Atom, built on ShareDB and OT algorithms to enable conflict-free text editing. It supports multi-user sync, cursor highlighting, file operations, and project awareness, requiring a Node.js server for remote pair programming.

metadata.name: github-hans
metadata.description: [废弃] {官方中文马上就来了} GitHub 汉化插件，GitHub 中文化界面。 (GitHub Translation To Chinese)

summary.zh: 这是一个已废弃的 GitHub 界面汉化插件，旨在将 GitHub 的英文界面翻译为中文，帮助英文基础薄弱的用户更轻松地使用 GitHub。项目依赖 Tampermonkey 浏览器插件运行，支持 Chrome、Opera 和 Safari，提供日常更新和预览截图，并鼓励社区参与翻译改进。
summary.en: This is a deprecated GitHub interface localization plugin that translates GitHub's English UI into Chinese, helping non-native English users navigate the platform more easily. It runs via the Tampermonkey browser extension, supports Chrome, Opera, and Safari, offers daily updates, and encourages community contributions for translation improvements.

metadata.name: Flarum
metadata.description: Flarum - 优雅自由的 PHP 轻社区

summary.zh: Flarum 是一款基于 PHP 和 Mithril.js 构建的开源轻量级论坛系统，强调简洁、快速与响应式设计。它继承自 esoTalk 和 FluxBB，具备高度可扩展性，支持主题定制与插件开发，适用于搭建现代化社区平台。目前处于测试阶段，提供中文支持与文档。
summary.en: Flarum is an open-source, lightweight forum software built with PHP and Mithril.js, focusing on simplicity, speed, and responsive design. Inheriting from esoTalk and FluxBB, it offers high extensibility, theme customization, and plugin support for modern community platforms. Currently in beta, it includes Chinese localization and documentation.

metadata.name: pyecharts
metadata.description: 🎨 Python Echarts Plotting Library

summary.zh: pyecharts 是一个基于 Apache ECharts 的 Python 数据可视化库，支持 30+ 种图表类型和 400+ 地图文件，提供简洁的链式调用 API，兼容 Jupyter Notebook 及主流 Web 框架，适用于数据分析与交互式图表生成。
summary.en: pyecharts is a Python data visualization library built on Apache ECharts, supporting 30+ chart types and 400+ map files. It offers a clean chainable API, integrates with Jupyter and web frameworks like Flask, and enables rich interactive visualizations for data analysis.

metadata.name: jumpserver
metadata.description: JumpServer is an open-source Privileged Access Management (PAM) platform that provides DevOps and IT teams with on-demand and secure access to SSH, RDP, Kubernetes, Database and RemoteApp endpoints through a web browser.

summary.zh: JumpServer 是一款开源的堡垒机（PAM）平台，为 DevOps 和 IT 团队提供通过浏览器安全访问 SSH、RDP、Kubernetes、数据库及远程应用端点的能力。支持细粒度权限控制、会话审计与自动化运维，适用于企业混合云环境下的统一访问管控。
summary.en: JumpServer is an open-source Privileged Access Management (PAM) platform that enables secure, on-demand access to SSH, RDP, Kubernetes, databases, and RemoteApp endpoints via a web browser. It offers role-based access control, session auditing, and centralized management for hybrid cloud environments.

metadata.name: vue-tutorial
metadata.description: vue2.0-tutorial

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Vue 2.0 的单页应用实战教程，涵盖 vue-cli、vue-router、vuex 和 vue-resource 等核心生态工具的使用。通过 webpack 构建、模块热加载和组件化开发，实现任务追踪 Demo，适合 Vue 2.0 初学者掌握现代前端工程化开发流程。
summary.en: A hands-on tutorial for building a single-page application with Vue 2.0, covering key ecosystem tools like vue-cli, vue-router, vuex, and vue-resource. It demonstrates webpack bundling, hot module reloading, and component-based development through a task tracking demo, ideal for beginners learning modern frontend workflows.

metadata.name: BoostNote-Legacy
metadata.description: This repository is outdated and new Boost Note app is available! We've launched a new Boost Note app which supports real-time collaborative writing. https://github.com/BoostIO/BoostNote-App

summary.zh: BoostNote-Legacy 是一款面向程序员的开源笔记应用，支持 Mac、Windows 和 Linux 平台，基于 Electron、React + Redux、Webpack 和 CSSModules 构建。该项目已停止维护，官方推荐使用支持实时协作的新版 Boost Note App。
summary.en: BoostNote-Legacy is an open-source note-taking app for programmers, available on Mac, Windows, and Linux, built with Electron, React + Redux, Webpack, and CSSModules. The project is deprecated, with the new collaborative Boost Note App now recommended.

metadata.name: sibi
metadata.description: V2EX 撕逼大战

summary.zh: 该项目收集并归档了V2EX等技术社区中引发激烈争论的热门事件，涵盖技术争议、社会话题、社区治理等，如中医致癌、JS分号规范、GFW讨论等。通过存档链接保留原始内容，防止信息丢失，为网络舆论研究提供数据支持。
summary.en: This repository archives heated debates and controversial incidents from V2EX and other tech communities, including topics like traditional Chinese medicine and cancer, JavaScript semicolon usage, GFW discussions, and community governance. It preserves original posts via archived links to prevent content loss and support online discourse research.

metadata.name: cpython
metadata.description: The Python programming language

summary.zh: CPython 是 Python 编程语言的官方参考实现，当前版本为 3.15.0 alpha 6。该项目包含完整的解释器源码、构建系统、标准库及开发工具，支持多平台编译（Unix/Linux/macOS/Windows），并提供 Profile Guided Optimization (PGO) 等高级优化选项，是 Python 语言演进的核心工程。
summary.en: CPython is the official reference implementation of the Python programming language, currently at version 3.15.0 alpha 6. It includes the full interpreter source code, build system, standard library, and development tools. It supports cross-platform compilation (Unix/Linux/macOS/Windows) and advanced optimizations like Profile Guided Optimization (PGO), serving as the core engine of Python's evolution.

metadata.name: py-patterns
metadata.description: 设计模式的python实现

summary.zh: 该项目是设计模式的Python3实现，涵盖创建型、结构型和行为型三大类共23种经典设计模式，代码结构清晰、分类明确，适合学习和参考。每个模式均提供独立实现文件，便于理解与应用。
summary.en: This repository provides Python 3 implementations of 23 classic design patterns, categorized into Creational, Structural, and Behavioral types. Well-organized and educational, it serves as a practical reference for learning and applying design patterns in Python.

metadata.name: django-bleach
metadata.description: Integrate awesome Bleach library into Django

summary.zh: django-bleach 是一个 Django 应用，将强大的 Bleach 库无缝集成到 Django 中，用于安全地清理和过滤用户提交的 HTML 内容。支持模型字段（BleachField）、表单字段和模板过滤器，可自定义允许的标签、属性和样式，防止 XSS 攻击，适用于富文本编辑场景。
summary.en: django-bleach is a Django app that seamlessly integrates the Bleach library to sanitize and clean user-submitted HTML. It provides BleachField for models, form fields, and template filters, allowing customizable whitelists for tags, attributes, and styles to prevent XSS attacks in rich text content.

metadata.name: python-style-guide
metadata.description: python code style guide book / python 代码、单元测试和项目规范

summary.zh: 本项目是一份完整的 Python 代码风格指南，涵盖代码规范、单元测试和项目结构设计，特别针对 Web 项目提供实用参考。内容以 GitBook 形式发布，支持在线阅读与多格式下载，旨在提升代码可读性与团队协作效率。
summary.en: This project is a comprehensive Python style guide covering code conventions, unit testing, and project structure, especially tailored for web projects. Published via GitBook, it offers online reading and multi-format downloads to enhance code readability and team collaboration.

metadata.name: wechat-explorer
metadata.description: 微信聊天记录导出、分析工具

summary.zh: 微信聊天记录导出与分析工具，支持从iOS备份中提取微信数据，提供聊天室列表、好友统计、记录导出及可视化分析功能，适用于数据备份与社交行为研究。
summary.en: A tool for exporting and analyzing WeChat chat records from iOS backups, supporting chatroom listing, friend statistics, message export, and data visualization for personal backup and social behavior analysis.

metadata.name: dingdang-robot
metadata.description: 🤖 叮当是一款可以工作在 Raspberry Pi 上的中文语音对话机器人/智能音箱项目。

summary.zh: 叮当是一款基于树莓派的开源中文语音对话机器人项目，支持离线唤醒、多引擎语音识别与合成、微信接入及智能家居控制。采用模块化设计，便于扩展插件，适合开发者打造个性化智能音箱。
summary.en: Dingdang is an open-source Chinese voice dialogue robot designed for Raspberry Pi, featuring offline wake-up, multi-engine speech recognition/synthesis, WeChat integration, and smart home control. Its modular architecture supports easy plugin expansion for custom smart speaker development.

metadata.name: django-auditlog
metadata.description: A Django app that keeps a log of changes made to an object.

summary.zh: django-auditlog 是一个轻量级 Django 应用，用于自动记录模型对象的变更历史，包括修改内容、操作用户及时间戳。它采用 JSON 格式存储变更摘要，性能高效且依赖极少，适用于审计追踪、合规记录等场景，优于 Django admin 日志的灵活性。
summary.en: django-auditlog is a lightweight Django app that automatically logs changes to model instances, including modified fields, acting user, and timestamps. It stores change summaries in JSON format, offering high performance and minimal dependencies, ideal for audit trails and compliance tracking with greater flexibility than Django admin logs.

metadata.name: vue-element-admin
metadata.description: :tada: A magical vue admin                                                                https://panjiachen.github.io/vue-element-admin

summary.zh: vue-element-admin 是一个基于 Vue 2.x 和 Element UI 的企业级后台管理系统前端解决方案，提供丰富的组件、国际化支持、权限路由、动态菜单等完整功能，适用于快速构建中大型单页应用。项目采用现代化前端技术栈，具备良好的工程化结构和扩展性。
summary.en: vue-element-admin is a production-ready admin dashboard solution built with Vue 2.x and Element UI. It offers rich components, i18n support, permission-based routing, dynamic menus, and more, enabling rapid development of large-scale single-page applications with modern frontend tooling.

metadata.name: Awesome_APIs
metadata.description: :octocat: A collection of APIs

summary.zh: 该项目是一个精选的API集合，涵盖动漫、博客、商业、机器学习、地图、支付、天气等30余个领域，为开发者提供丰富、实用的第三方接口资源。内容结构清晰，分类详尽，支持中英文文档，是快速查找和集成API的优质参考。
summary.en: This repository is a curated collection of awesome APIs across 30+ categories including anime, blogging, machine learning, payments, and weather. It offers developers a well-organized, multilingual resource for discovering and integrating third-party APIs efficiently.

metadata.name: v2ex
metadata.description: The unofficial V2EX app for iOS

summary.zh: 这是一个非官方的 V2EX iOS 客户端，使用 Swift 4.1 开发，支持 iOS 10.0 及以上系统。项目采用现代 iOS 开发技术栈，提供流畅的社区浏览体验，包含话题查看、节点导航等核心功能，适合 V2EX 用户移动端使用。
summary.en: An unofficial V2EX iOS client built with Swift 4.1, supporting iOS 10.0+. It offers a smooth mobile experience for browsing topics, navigating nodes, and interacting with the V2EX community using modern iOS development practices.

metadata.name: opensource
metadata.description: 【编程随想】收藏的开源项目清单

summary.zh: 该项目由‘编程随想’维护，收录高质量开源项目清单，涵盖C/C++与Python语言的开源库及示例代码，按编程语言分类整理，便于开发者快速查找与学习。
summary.en: Maintained by 'ProgramThink', this repo curates a list of high-quality open-source projects, including libraries and sample code in C/C++ and Python, categorized by programming language for easy discovery and learning.

metadata.name: docsify-cli
metadata.description: 🖌 docsify cli tool - A magical documentation generator.

summary.zh: docsify-cli 是 docsify 的命令行工具，用于快速生成和本地预览现代化文档网站。支持一键初始化项目、实时重载服务、自定义主题与插件，极大简化了静态文档的搭建流程，适用于技术文档、项目说明等场景。
summary.en: docsify-cli is the command-line tool for docsify, enabling rapid generation and local preview of modern documentation sites. It supports project initialization, live-reload serving, custom themes, and plugins, streamlining the creation of static documentation for technical guides and project docs.

metadata.name: docsify
metadata.description: 🃏 A magical documentation site generator.

summary.zh: Docsify 是一个无需构建过程的动态文档站点生成器，支持将 Markdown 文件即时渲染为美观的网页。具备全文搜索、多主题、插件系统和 Emoji 支持，适合快速搭建轻量级文档网站。
summary.en: Docsify is a dynamic documentation site generator that renders Markdown files into web pages without a build step. It features full-text search, multiple themes, a plugin API, and emoji support, ideal for lightweight documentation sites.

metadata.name: vira-theme-support
metadata.description: Vira Theme is the official successor of the popular Material Theme. This premium version is actively maintained, includes hand-curated icons and more features

summary.zh: Vira Theme 是广受欢迎的 Material Theme 的官方继任者，专为 Visual Studio Code 设计的付费主题扩展。它提供多款精美深色主题与精选图标，支持持续更新与深度定制，旨在为开发者打造现代、沉浸式的编码视觉体验。
summary.en: Vira Theme is the official successor to the popular Material Theme, a premium Visual Studio Code extension offering refined dark themes and hand-curated icons. It delivers a modern, customizable interface with ongoing updates for an enhanced coding experience.

metadata.name: djangotoolbox
metadata.description: Django tools for building nonrel backends

summary.zh: Djangotoolbox 是一个为 Django 框架提供非关系型数据库支持的通用工具库，包含用于构建 NoSQL 后端的基础类、特殊字段类型（如 ListField、DictField）以及适配管理后台的模块，旨在简化在 NoSQL 数据库上运行 Django 应用的开发流程。
summary.en: Djangotoolbox offers a unified API for running Django on non-relational/NoSQL databases, providing base backend classes, specialized field types like ListField and DictField, and admin overrides to ensure compatibility with Django's admin interface in non-relational environments.

metadata.name: mycli
metadata.description: A Terminal Client for MySQL with AutoCompletion and Syntax Highlighting.

summary.zh: mycli 是一款专为 MySQL 设计的终端命令行客户端，支持智能自动补全、语法高亮、多行查询和历史模糊搜索。基于 prompt_toolkit 构建，提供上下文感知补全、SSL 连接、查询计时、收藏查询及 LLM 查询支持，显著提升数据库操作效率。
summary.en: mycli is a terminal client for MySQL featuring intelligent auto-completion, syntax highlighting, multiline queries, and fuzzy history search. Built on prompt_toolkit, it offers context-aware suggestions, SSL support, query timing, favorite queries, and LLM integration for enhanced database interaction.

metadata.name: 12306ForMac
metadata.description: An unofficial 12306 Client for Mac

summary.zh: 12306ForMac 是一款基于 Swift 开发的非官方 macOS 客户端，支持在 OS X 10.11 及以上系统上实现 12306 火车票订票与捡票功能，摆脱对 Windows 虚拟机或网页端的依赖。项目使用 Carthage 管理依赖，集成了 Alamofire、PromiseKit 等主流框架，适合学习 macOS 桌面应用开发。
summary.en: 12306ForMac is an unofficial macOS client built with Swift, enabling train ticket booking and monitoring on 12306 without relying on Windows VMs or web browsers. It requires OS X 10.11+, uses Carthage for dependency management, and integrates Alamofire, PromiseKit, and FMDB, serving as a practical example for macOS app development.

metadata.name: django-fsm
metadata.description: Django friendly finite state machine support

summary.zh: viewflow.fsm 是一个为 Django 设计的有限状态机库，支持通过声明式方式管理对象状态流转。它基于 Python 枚举定义状态与转换规则，提供数据库无关的轻量级实现，适用于构建持久化工作流和快速生成 UI。新版 API 更现代化，但需迁移旧项目。
summary.en: viewflow.fsm is a Django-friendly finite state machine library enabling declarative state management using Python enums. It offers a database-agnostic, lightweight implementation for defining states and transitions, ideal for building persistent workflows with auto-generated UIs. The new API is modernized but requires migration from older versions.

metadata.name: Best-App
metadata.description: 收集&推荐优秀的 Apps/硬件/技巧/周边等

summary.zh: 该项目旨在系统性地收集与推荐优质应用、硬件、生活技巧及周边产品，帮助用户高效发现能提升效率与生活品质的工具。涵盖 macOS、iOS、Android 等多平台付费与免费软件，并设有配件与生活好物推荐，强调客观评价与实用导向，拒绝广告与捐赠。
summary.en: This project systematically curates and recommends high-quality apps, hardware, life hacks, and accessories to help users discover tools that enhance productivity and quality of life. It covers paid and free software across macOS, iOS, and Android, along with Apple accessories and lifestyle products, emphasizing objective reviews and practical value without ads or donations.

metadata.name: framework
metadata.description: Simple forum software for building great communities.

summary.zh: Flarum 是一个轻量、快速且美观的论坛软件，专为构建高效社区而设计。基于 PHP 和 Mithril.js 框架，具备响应式界面与强大的扩展 API，支持高度定制。无冗余依赖，部署简单，适合追求简洁与性能的开发者搭建现代讨论平台。
summary.en: Flarum is a lightweight, fast, and elegant forum software designed for building thriving communities. Built with PHP and Mithril.js, it features a responsive UI and a powerful Extension API for deep customization. With minimal dependencies and easy deployment, it's ideal for developers seeking a clean, high-performance discussion platform.

metadata.name: django-rules
metadata.description: Awesome Django authorization, without the database

summary.zh: django-rules 是一个轻量级但功能强大的 Django 权限库，支持对象级权限控制且无需数据库。它基于规则引擎设计，类似决策树，可灵活组合谓词函数，无缝集成 Django 视图、模板和 Admin，适用于复杂权限逻辑场景。
summary.en: django-rules is a lightweight yet powerful authorization library for Django that enables object-level permissions without requiring a database. Built on a rule-based framework similar to decision trees, it supports flexible predicate composition and integrates seamlessly with Django views, templates, and the Admin interface.

metadata.name: wxpy
metadata.description: 微信机器人 / 可能是最优雅的微信个人号 API ✨✨

summary.zh: wxpy 是一个基于 itchat 的 Python 微信个人号 API 封装库，提供优雅、对象化的接口，支持自动登录、消息收发、好友管理、群聊操作及聊天机器人等功能。适用于日志推送、智能家居控制、消息转发等自动化场景，强调易用性与扩展性。
summary.en: wxpy is a Python-based WeChat personal account API wrapper built on itchat, offering elegant, object-oriented interfaces for automating WeChat tasks. It supports auto-login, messaging, friend/group management, chatbots, and integrations like smart home control or log forwarding, prioritizing usability and extensibility.

metadata.name: fuzzywuzzy
metadata.description: Fuzzy String Matching in Python

summary.zh: 该项目是 Python 中的模糊字符串匹配库，用于计算字符串之间的相似度，广泛应用于数据清洗、实体匹配等场景。原项目已迁移并更名为 TheFuzz，当前版本 0.18.0 对应 TheFuzz 的 0.19.0。
summary.en: This is a Python library for fuzzy string matching, used to calculate similarity between strings, commonly applied in data cleaning and entity resolution. The project has been renamed and moved to TheFuzz, with version 0.18.0 corresponding to TheFuzz 0.19.0.

metadata.name: gotty
metadata.description: Share your terminal as a web application

summary.zh: GoTTY 是一款将命令行工具实时共享为 Web 应用的轻量级工具，支持通过浏览器访问终端会话。它提供 TLS 加密、基础认证、随机 URL 等安全特性，适用于远程运维、演示或协作场景，使用 Go 语言开发，部署简单。
summary.en: GoTTY is a lightweight tool that turns CLI commands into real-time web applications, enabling terminal access via a browser. It supports TLS encryption, basic authentication, random URLs, and dynamic resizing, ideal for remote operations, demos, or collaboration. Built in Go, it's easy to deploy and highly configurable.

metadata.name: awesome-python-cn
metadata.description: Python资源大全中文版，包括：Web框架、网络爬虫、模板引擎、数据库、数据可视化、图片处理等，由「开源前哨」和「Python开发者」微信公号团队维护更新。

summary.zh: 该项目是 Python 资源大全的中文版本，系统整理了 Python 生态中的核心工具与库，涵盖 Web 开发、爬虫、数据处理、机器学习等多个领域。由「开源前哨」和「Python开发者」团队维护，为国内开发者提供高质量、结构化的中文技术资源导航。
summary.en: This is the Chinese version of the Awesome Python repository, offering a curated list of high-quality Python libraries and tools across domains like web development, data science, and machine learning. Maintained by the 'Open Source Sentry' and 'Python Developer' teams, it serves as a comprehensive resource guide for Chinese-speaking developers.

metadata.name: hacknical
metadata.description: Hacknical, hacker & technical. A website for GitHub user to make a better resume.

summary.zh: Hacknical 是一款专为 GitHub 用户设计的简历生成工具，通过分析用户的贡献、提交、编程语言和仓库数据，自动生成可视化技术简历。支持英文界面、组织账号展示及 PDF 导出，采用 React + Koa2 技术栈，集成 Chart.js 实现数据图表化，助力开发者打造专业个人品牌。
summary.en: Hacknical is a resume generator for GitHub users, analyzing contributions, commits, languages, and repositories to create visual technical resumes. It supports English UI, organization accounts, mobile viewing, and PDF export, built with React and Koa2, featuring data visualization via Chart.js to enhance developers' personal branding.

metadata.name: tenant-point
metadata.description: 租房要点，适用于北上广深杭，欢迎补充。

summary.zh: 该仓库是一份针对北上广深杭等城市租房者的实用指南，涵盖找房策略、避坑技巧与合同注意事项。重点包括优先直租、警惕黑中介、识别虚假房源、验明房东资质及合租安全建议，帮助租客在预算有限时高效找到靠谱住房，减少纠纷与居住不适。
summary.en: This repo provides a practical guide for renters in major Chinese cities like Beijing and Shanghai. It covers strategies to avoid scams, identify fake listings, verify landlord legitimacy, and navigate shared housing. Aimed at helping tenants find reliable housing efficiently—even on a tight budget—it emphasizes due diligence and contract safeguards.

metadata.name: drf-cached-instances
metadata.description: Cached instances for Django REST Framework

summary.zh: 该项目为Django REST Framework提供缓存实例功能，通过将模型数据序列化为JSON并存储于缓存中，显著减少API读取时的数据库查询次数。适用于高并发读操作且模型间关联复杂的场景，支持零数据库请求响应单条数据，极大提升性能。
summary.en: This project provides cached instances for Django REST Framework, serializing model data to JSON and storing it in cache to drastically reduce database queries during API reads. Ideal for high-read APIs with complex model relationships, enabling zero or minimal DB hits for faster responses.

metadata.name: drf-extensions
metadata.description: DRF-extensions is a collection of custom extensions for Django REST Framework

summary.zh: DRF-extensions 是为 Django REST Framework 提供的一组实用扩展，支持缓存、条件请求、嵌套路由、批量操作等功能，提升 API 开发效率与性能。兼容多版本 Python、Django 及 DRF，适用于构建高性能 RESTful 服务。
summary.en: DRF-extensions is a collection of powerful extensions for Django REST Framework, offering features like caching, conditional requests, nested routes, and bulk operations to enhance API performance and development efficiency. It supports multiple versions of Python, Django, and DRF.

metadata.name: IPProxyTool
metadata.description: python ip proxy tool  scrapy crawl. 抓取大量免费代理 ip，提取有效 ip 使用

summary.zh: 该项目是基于 Python 和 Scrapy 的免费代理 IP 抓取与验证工具，支持从多个代理网站爬取 IP，并通过异步方式验证其可用性、匿名性和 HTTPS 支持。数据存入 MySQL 数据库，并提供 RESTful 接口供外部调用，适用于爬虫反封锁场景。
summary.en: This project is a free proxy IP scraping and validation tool built with Python and Scrapy. It crawls multiple proxy websites, validates IPs for availability, anonymity, and HTTPS support using asynchronous checks, stores data in MySQL, and provides RESTful APIs for external access, ideal for anti-blocking in web scraping.

metadata.name: hexo-generator-restful
metadata.description: Generate RESTful json data for Hexo plugins.

summary.zh: 该插件为 Hexo 博客生成 RESTful 风格的 JSON 数据接口，支持站点配置、文章列表分页、标签分类、单篇文章及页面等数据的 API 化输出，便于构建前后端分离的 SPA 应用。
summary.en: This plugin generates RESTful JSON APIs for Hexo blogs, enabling access to site config, paginated posts, tags, categories, individual articles, and pages—ideal for building SPA applications with decoupled frontends.

metadata.name: mama2
metadata.description: 妈妈计划-众人拾柴火焰高

summary.zh: 妈妈计划2（MAMA2）旨在解决MacBook观看视频时因Flash播放导致的高发热问题，通过替换为HTML5 Video播放实现。项目支持哔哩哔哩、优酷、搜狐视频等主流平台，并提供可扩展的seeker脚本机制，鼓励社区协作维护各站点解析规则。
summary.en: MAMA2 aims to reduce MacBook overheating during video playback by replacing Flash with HTML5 Video. It supports major platforms like Bilibili, Youku, and Sohu Video, and features an extensible seeker script system for community-driven maintenance of site-specific parsing logic.

metadata.name: bilibili-mac-client
metadata.description: An unofficial bilibili client for mac

summary.zh: 一款专为 macOS 设计的非官方哔哩哔哩客户端，支持硬解播放、libass 弹幕渲染、多网站视频解析（基于 You-Get）、直播观看、本地视频加载及弹幕屏蔽等功能，性能优异，显著降低高画质视频播放时的电量消耗。
summary.en: An unofficial Bilibili client for macOS featuring hardware decoding, libass-based danmaku rendering, support for parsing and playing videos from nearly 100 sites via You-Get, live streaming, local video playback with danmaku/subtitle loading, and intelligent keyword filtering, delivering superior performance and energy efficiency.

metadata.name: grumpy
metadata.description: Grumpy is a Python to Go source code transcompiler and runtime.

summary.zh: Grumpy 是谷歌开发的 Python 到 Go 的源码转译器及运行时，旨在替代 CPython 2.7。它将 Python 代码静态编译为 Go 代码并生成原生二进制文件，无需虚拟机。支持大部分 Python 语法和标准库，但不支持 exec/eval 等动态特性及 C 扩展模块。
summary.en: Grumpy is a Python-to-Go source code transcompiler and runtime by Google, designed as a near drop-in replacement for CPython 2.7. It compiles Python into Go source, then to native code—eliminating the need for a VM. It supports most language features but lacks dynamic execution (e.g., eval) and C extension compatibility.

metadata.name: online-markdown-reader
metadata.description: Markdown  在线阅读器

summary.zh: 这是一个功能丰富的在线 Markdown 阅读器，支持代码高亮（Prism.js/Highlight.js）、自动生成目录、本地图片显示及 HTML 导出。扩展支持 Todo 列表、MathJax 数学公式、时序图、Emoji 表情、ECharts 图表和 Fancybox 图片预览，适用于技术文档编写与展示。
summary.en: A feature-rich online Markdown reader supporting syntax highlighting (Prism.js/Highlight.js), auto-generated TOC, local image rendering, and HTML export. It extends Markdown with Todo lists, MathJax equations, sequence diagrams, Emoji, ECharts visualizations, and Fancybox image previews—ideal for technical documentation.

metadata.name: china_area_mysql
metadata.description: 中国5级行政区域mysql库

summary.zh: 该项目提供中国五级行政区域（省、市、县、乡、村）的完整MySQL数据库，涵盖2020年及2023年数据，包含大陆地区邮政编码与经纬度信息，支持港澳台地区数据（层级略少）。表结构清晰，含拼音、简称、组合名等字段，适用于地址管理、地理信息系统等场景。
summary.en: This project provides a comprehensive MySQL database of China's five-level administrative divisions (province, city, county, town, village), including data from 2020 and 2023. It covers postal codes and latitude/longitude for mainland China, with partial data for Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan. Ideal for address systems and GIS applications.

metadata.name: wx_pay_python
metadata.description: weixin pay python 微信支付功能集，前期开发借鉴zwczou https://github.com/zwczou/weixin-python ，后期补充及完善微信支付新功能，处理因微信支付调用规则修改而无法使用的旧代码，升级到最新微信支付接口配套代码

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于Python的微信支付SDK，支持JSAPI支付、订单查询、退款、对账单下载、红包发放、企业付款及刷卡支付等完整功能。项目基于zwczou/weixin-python改进，适配微信支付最新接口规范，解决旧版API因规则变更导致的失效问题，适用于需要集成微信支付能力的后端系统。
summary.en: This is a Python-based WeChat Pay SDK supporting JSAPI payment, order query, refund, bill download, red packet sending, enterprise payment, and swiping card payment. It improves upon zwczou/weixin-python, adapts to the latest WeChat Pay API standards, and fixes compatibility issues caused by API changes, ideal for backend systems integrating WeChat Pay.

metadata.name: GADownloading
metadata.description: A Gorgeous LoadingView (一个绚丽的LoadingView )

summary.zh: GADownloading 是一款纯代码实现的绚丽加载动画组件，支持进度更新、成功与失败状态切换，提供多种自定义颜色属性，无需图片资源，适用于 Android 应用的下载或加载场景，可通过 JitPack 快速集成。
summary.en: GADownloading is a pure-code animated loading view for Android, featuring progress updates, success/failure state animations, and customizable colors without image assets. Ideal for download or loading UIs, it supports easy integration via JitPack.

summary.zh: 该仓库整理了2015年阿里无线前端团队的技术文章，涵盖H5性能优化、移动端适配、前端架构、CSS高级技巧及双11实战经验，聚焦无线电商场景下的前端技术演进与工程实践。
summary.en: This repo collects technical articles from Alibaba's mobile frontend team in 2015, covering H5 performance optimization, mobile adaptation, frontend architecture, advanced CSS, and Double 11 case studies, focusing on frontend evolution in mobile e-commerce.

metadata.name: iview
metadata.description: A high quality UI Toolkit built on Vue.js 2.0

summary.zh: iView 是一个基于 Vue.js 的高质量 UI 工具包，提供数十个美观且实用的组件，API 友好，文档详尽，支持 Vue 1.x 和 2.x，兼容 SSR、Nuxt.js、TypeScript 及 Electron，已被阿里巴巴、腾讯、百度等知名企业广泛使用。
summary.en: iView is a high-quality UI toolkit built on Vue.js, offering dozens of beautiful and practical components with a friendly API, comprehensive documentation, and support for Vue 1.x/2.x, SSR, Nuxt.js, TypeScript, and Electron, widely adopted by companies like Alibaba, Tencent, and Baidu.

metadata.name: algoliasearch-django
metadata.description: Seamless integration of Algolia into your Django project.

summary.zh: AlgoliaSearch-Django 是一个用于在 Django 项目中无缝集成 Algolia 搜索服务的官方库。它基于 Python 客户端，支持自动索引、地理搜索、多索引配置和字段预处理，兼容 Django 4.x 和 5.x，适用于构建高性能的全文搜索和实时搜索功能。
summary.en: AlgoliaSearch-Django is an official library for seamless integration of Algolia's search API into Django projects. Built on the Python client, it supports auto-indexing, geo-search, multiple indices, and field preprocessing, compatible with Django 4.x and 5.x, ideal for high-performance full-text and real-time search.

metadata.name: fonts
metadata.description: Patched fonts for Powerline users.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供专为 Powerline 状态栏插件预修补的字体集合，支持多种主流等宽字体（如 DejaVu、Fira Mono、Hack 等），确保终端状态栏符号正确显示。包含自动化安装与卸载脚本，兼容 Linux 发行版的包管理器，简化字体部署流程。
summary.en: This repository offers pre-patched fonts for the Powerline statusline plugin, supporting popular monospace fonts like DejaVu, Fira Mono, and Hack to ensure proper rendering of Powerline symbols. It includes automated install/uninstall scripts and supports package managers on Linux distributions for easy deployment.

metadata.name: code_news
metadata.description: Diycode每日文章精选

summary.zh: Diycode每日精选是一个专注于Android开发的技术文章聚合项目，每日收录高质量技术文章并附点评，涵盖Android性能优化、架构设计、React Native、Kotlin、模块化、安全等前沿实践，适合移动端开发者持续学习与技能提升。
summary.en: Diycode Daily Picks is a curated collection of high-quality technical articles focused on Android development, featuring expert commentary and covering topics like performance optimization, architecture, React Native, Kotlin, modularization, and security—ideal for mobile developers seeking continuous learning.

metadata.name: proxychains-ng
metadata.description: proxychains ng (new generation) - a preloader which hooks calls to sockets in dynamically linked programs and redirects it through one or more socks/http proxies. continuation of the unmaintained proxychains project. the sf.net page is currently not updated, use releases from github release page instead.

summary.zh: ProxyChains-NG 是一款基于 LD_PRELOAD 技术的 UNIX 网络代理工具，通过劫持动态链接程序的 socket 调用，将 TCP 连接重定向至 SOCKS4a/5 或 HTTP 代理链。支持 Linux、BSD、macOS 和 Haiku 系统，适用于绕过网络限制或匿名访问场景，但不支持 UDP/ICMP。
summary.en: ProxyChains-NG is a UNIX tool that uses LD_PRELOAD to hook socket calls in dynamically linked programs, redirecting TCP traffic through SOCKS4a/5 or HTTP proxy chains. It supports Linux, BSD, macOS, and Haiku, ideal for bypassing censorship or enabling proxy use in non-proxy-aware apps, though UDP/ICMP are not supported.

metadata.name: django-materializecss-form
metadata.description: Materializecss for Django Form

summary.zh: 该项目为 Django 表单提供 Materialize CSS 样式支持，通过简单的模板标签即可将表单字段渲染为 Material Design 风格。支持全表单或单个字段渲染、自定义网格尺寸、图标集成（如 Font Awesome），并兼容日期时间选择器等组件，极大简化前端美化流程。
summary.en: This project provides Materialize CSS styling for Django forms via simple template tags. It enables rendering entire forms or individual fields with Material Design aesthetics, supports custom grid sizing, icon integration (e.g., Font Awesome), and includes compatibility with date/time pickers, streamlining frontend styling.

metadata.name: django-material
metadata.description: Material Design for Django

summary.zh: Django Material 是一个基于 Google Material Design 3 的 Django UI 框架，提供低层级组件和完整的 CRUD/管理界面，无需前端框架依赖。它集成 TailwindCSS 与 django-cotton，支持 SPA 式导航（Unpoly.js），专为 AI 辅助开发优化，适合快速构建现代化、响应式且可访问的 Web 应用。
summary.en: Django Material brings Google's Material Design 3 to Django with low-level UI components and full CRUD/admin interfaces. Built on TailwindCSS and django-cotton, it enables SPA-like navigation via Unpoly.js, requires no frontend frameworks, and features AI-optimized APIs for rapid, accessible, and responsive web development.

metadata.name: httpstat
metadata.description: curl statistics made simple

summary.zh: httpstat 是一款简洁美观的 curl 请求统计可视化工具，以单文件 Python 脚本形式提供，无外部依赖，兼容 Python 3。支持展示响应时间、IP 地址、传输速度等关键指标，并可通过环境变量灵活配置输出内容，适用于 HTTP 性能调试与监控。
summary.en: httpstat is a clean and intuitive tool that visualizes curl request statistics in a readable format. As a single-file, dependency-free Python script compatible with Python 3, it displays key metrics like response time, IP addresses, and transfer speed, with customizable output via environment variables for HTTP performance analysis.

metadata.name: awesome-programming-books
metadata.description: 经典编程书籍大全，涵盖：计算机系统与网络、系统架构、算法与数据结构、前端开发、后端开发、移动开发、数据库、测试、项目与团队、程序员职业修炼、求职面试等

summary.zh: 该项目收录100+本经典编程书籍，涵盖计算机系统、网络、算法、前后端开发、移动开发、数据库、测试、架构设计及程序员职业发展等领域，精选自伯乐在线及社交媒体广泛推荐的技术好书，是程序员系统学习和进阶的优质书单资源。
summary.en: This repository curates 100+ classic programming books across computer systems, networking, algorithms, frontend/backend development, mobile, databases, testing, architecture, and career growth. Compiled from Jobbole and social media recommendations, it serves as a comprehensive reading list for developers.

metadata.name: DjangoUeditor
metadata.description: DjangoUeditor

summary.zh: DjangoUeditor 是一个用于在 Django 项目中集成百度 UEditor HTML 编辑器的第三方模块，支持富文本编辑、图片与附件上传、自定义工具栏及路径格式化等功能。该项目已停止维护，但代码结构清晰，适合 fork 后二次开发。
summary.en: DjangoUeditor is a third-party module that integrates Baidu's UEditor HTML editor into Django applications, supporting rich text editing, image/file uploads, customizable toolbars, and dynamic upload path formatting. The project is no longer maintained but remains suitable for forking and customization.

metadata.name: flow.ci
metadata.description: Public docs & issues for flow.ci

summary.zh: flow.ci 是一个持续集成（CI）平台，提供自动化构建、测试和部署服务。该项目公开文档与问题追踪，支持中英文，便于开发者快速上手和反馈。通过 Gitter 社区促进用户交流，提升协作效率。
summary.en: flow.ci is a continuous integration (CI) platform offering automated build, test, and deployment services. The repo hosts public documentation and issue tracking in both English and Chinese, enabling developers to get started quickly and provide feedback. Community interaction is supported via Gitter.

metadata.name: IPProxyPool
metadata.description: IPProxyPool代理池项目，提供代理ip

summary.zh: IPProxyPool 是一个基于 Python 的代理 IP 池项目，支持 Python 2 和 3，自动抓取、验证并管理高匿/匿名/透明代理。提供 RESTful API 接口，支持按类型、协议、地区等条件筛选，内置 SQLite 存储，可通过 SQLAlchemy 扩展至 MySQL、MongoDB 等数据库，适用于爬虫等需高可用代理的场景。
summary.en: IPProxyPool is a Python-based proxy IP pool project supporting both Python 2 and 3. It automatically crawls, validates, and manages high-anonymity, anonymous, and transparent proxies. It provides a RESTful API with filtering by type, protocol, and region, uses SQLite by default, and supports extensibility to MySQL and MongoDB via SQLAlchemy, ideal for web scraping and high-availability proxy needs.

metadata.name: AlloyFinger
metadata.description: Super tiny size multi-touch gestures library for the web. 　　　You can touch this →

summary.zh: AlloyFinger 是一款超轻量级的多点触控手势库，专为 Web 应用设计，支持旋转、缩放、滑动、点击等丰富手势，体积小巧且易于集成，适用于移动端交互增强场景。
summary.en: AlloyFinger is a super lightweight multi-touch gesture library for the web, supporting gestures like rotate, pinch, swipe, tap, and more. It's easy to integrate and ideal for enhancing mobile web interactions.

metadata.name: git-commit-emoji-cn
metadata.description: 😁 git commit message emoji 使用指南

summary.zh: 该仓库提供了一套完整的 Git 提交信息 emoji 使用规范，帮助开发者通过表情符号清晰标识提交类型，提升提交历史的可读性与可维护性。涵盖常用场景如新功能、Bug 修复、重构、测试等，并给出格式建议与命令行 emoji 显示方案。
summary.en: This repo offers a comprehensive guide for using emojis in Git commit messages to clearly indicate commit types, improving readability and maintainability of commit history. It covers common scenarios like new features, bug fixes, refactoring, and testing, with formatting guidelines and terminal emoji display solutions.

metadata.name: SMValidator
metadata.description: a simple but powerful tool for validating form fields.  support bootstrap and your own styles.

summary.zh: SMValidator 是一款轻量级、无依赖的表单验证工具，支持自定义规则、消息与样式，兼容 Bootstrap 和 Semantic UI，可在 HTML 中使用正则表达式，并提供 JavaScript 配置方式，适用于 IE8+ 浏览器。
summary.en: SMValidator is a lightweight, dependency-free form validation tool supporting customizable rules, messages, and styles. It integrates with Bootstrap and Semantic UI, allows RegExp in HTML, and works with IE8+ via HTML attributes or JavaScript configuration.

metadata.name: jstraining
metadata.description: 全栈工程师培训材料

summary.zh: 本仓库为全栈工程师培训材料，涵盖前端演进、React 技术栈、Node.js 后端开发及前端工程化实践，适合具备 HTML、CSS、JavaScript 基础的学员。通过四讲内容，帮助学习者掌握前后端分离架构与全栈开发技能，包含课堂练习与环境配置指南。
summary.en: This repository provides full-stack engineer training materials covering frontend evolution, React stack, Node.js backend development, and frontend engineering practices. Designed for learners with basic HTML, CSS, and JavaScript knowledge, it includes four modules with hands-on exercises and environment setup guides.

metadata.name: material-ui-vue
metadata.description: It is a materializecss.com implementation with Vue.js.

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Vue.js 实现的 MaterializeCSS 组件库，旨在将 Materialize 的设计风格与 Vue 的响应式开发模式结合。项目提供下拉菜单、徽章等组件，需配合 jQuery 和 Materialize 的 CSS/JS 使用。目前处于试验阶段，不建议生产环境使用。
summary.en: A Vue.js-based implementation of MaterializeCSS, integrating Material Design components with Vue's reactive framework. It includes components like dropdowns and badges, requiring jQuery and Materialize assets. Currently experimental and unstable—not recommended for production.

metadata.name: hexo-theme-material
metadata.description: Material Design theme for hexo.

summary.zh: 这是一个为 Hexo 博客框架设计的纯 Material Design 主题，遵循 Google 的 Material Design 设计规范，提供现代化、响应式的视觉体验。支持多语言文档、自定义配置和跨浏览器兼容性，适用于个人博客或技术文档站点。
summary.en: A pure Material Design theme for Hexo, adhering to Google's design guidelines. It offers a modern, responsive UI with multi-language support, customizable settings, and cross-browser compatibility, ideal for personal blogs or technical documentation sites.

metadata.name: vue
metadata.description: This is the repo for Vue 2. For Vue 3, go to https://github.com/vuejs/core

summary.zh: Vue 2 是一个渐进式前端框架，用于构建用户界面，现已停止维护（2023年12月31日终止支持）。其核心库专注于视图层，支持增量采用，适用于从简单组件到复杂单页应用的场景。建议新项目使用 Vue 3，现有项目可参考迁移指南升级。
summary.en: Vue 2 is a progressive framework for building user interfaces, now end-of-life as of December 31, 2023. It focuses on the view layer and supports incremental adoption. While no longer receiving updates, it remains available via CDNs and package managers. New projects should use Vue 3, with migration guidance provided for existing users.

metadata.name: awesome-vue
metadata.description: 🎉 A curated list of awesome things related to Vue.js

summary.zh: 这是一个精选的 Vue.js 相关资源集合，涵盖官方文档、教程、组件库、UI 框架、企业级应用案例及开源项目，为开发者提供从入门到进阶的全面指南，助力高效构建现代化前端应用。
summary.en: A curated collection of high-quality resources related to Vue.js, including official docs, tutorials, UI libraries, frameworks, real-world projects, and enterprise use cases, serving as a comprehensive guide for developers at all levels.

metadata.name: intercooler-js
metadata.description: Making AJAX as easy as anchor tags

summary.zh: Intercooler.js 是一个轻量级（6.74KB）的 jQuery 插件，通过 HTML 属性实现 AJAX 请求，简化前端交互。支持事件触发、进度指示、RESTful 依赖、历史记录等功能，便于增量集成到现有项目。该项目已升级为 htmx，不再依赖 jQuery，功能更强大。
summary.en: Intercooler.js is a lightweight (6.74KB) jQuery-based library that enables AJAX via HTML attributes, simplifying frontend interactions. It supports event triggers, progress indicators, RESTful dependencies, history navigation, and more. Designed for easy integration, it has evolved into htmx—a modern, jQuery-free successor with enhanced capabilities.

metadata.name: pageResponse
metadata.description: 移动端响应式插件

summary.zh: 该插件通过 transform:scale 实现移动端页面响应式缩放，支持三种适配模式（auto/contain/cover），无需 rem 或媒体查询即可精准适配各类设备。兼容 iOS4+、Android2.3+ 等旧系统，体积仅约1KB，零依赖，适用于 H5 单页、滑屏场景，如“超级收银员”案例所示。
summary.en: This plugin enables responsive scaling on mobile devices using transform:scale, supporting three modes (auto/contain/cover) for precise adaptation without rem or media queries. Lightweight (~1KB), zero-dependency, and compatible with iOS4+, Android2.3+, ideal for H5 single-page or swipe-screen apps like 'Super Cashier'.

metadata.name: CSSgram
metadata.description: CSS library for Instagram filters

summary.zh: CSSgram 是一个基于 Sass 和 CSS 的 Instagram 滤镜库，通过 CSS 滤镜与混合模式模拟照片滤镜效果。它利用伪元素实现色彩叠加，无需图像处理即可在网页中为图片添加复古、胶片等风格滤镜，适用于前端快速美化图片展示。
summary.en: CSSgram is a Sass and CSS-based library that replicates Instagram-style photo filters using CSS filters and blend modes. By leveraging pseudo-elements, it applies color overlays and effects directly in the browser, enabling image styling without manual editing—ideal for web-based photo enhancement.

metadata.name: odoo
metadata.description: Odoo. Open Source Apps To Grow Your Business.

summary.zh: Odoo 是一套基于 Web 的开源商业应用套件，涵盖 CRM、电商、仓储、财务、人力资源等模块，支持独立使用或无缝集成构建完整的企业资源计划（ERP）系统。其模块化设计和高度可定制性助力企业灵活扩展业务功能。
summary.en: Odoo is a suite of web-based open source business applications including CRM, eCommerce, inventory, accounting, HR, and more. Apps can be used standalone or integrated to form a full-featured ERP system, offering flexibility and scalability for growing businesses.

metadata.name: vue-beauty
metadata.description: Beautiful  UI components build with vue and ant design

summary.zh: vue-beauty 是一个基于 Vue.js 和 Ant Design 设计语言构建的 UI 组件库，提供丰富、美观且易用的前端组件。支持组件化开发，封装复杂逻辑，提供简洁 API，适用于快速搭建高质量中后台应用，兼容现代浏览器。
summary.en: vue-beauty is a Vue.js-based UI component library built with Ant Design principles, offering rich, elegant, and user-friendly components. It supports component-driven development, encapsulates complexity with simple APIs, and is ideal for rapidly building high-quality admin dashboards, compatible with modern browsers.

metadata.name: vue-carbon
metadata.description: 此项目已停止维护，建议迁移到  https://github.com/museui/muse-ui/

summary.zh: vue-carbon 是一个基于 Vue.js 1.0 开发的 Material Design 风格移动端 Web UI 组件库，参考 CARBON 和 Framework7 设计资源。提供丰富的交互组件如刷新控件、导航栏等，适用于移动端单页应用开发。项目已停止维护，建议迁移至 Muse UI。
summary.en: vue-carbon is a Material Design-inspired mobile web UI library built on Vue.js 1.0, referencing CARBON and Framework7 design resources. It offers interactive components like refresh controls and navigation bars for mobile SPA development. The project is no longer maintained; migration to Muse UI is recommended.

metadata.name: Keen-UI
metadata.description: A lightweight Vue.js UI library with a simple API, inspired by Google's Material Design.

summary.zh: Keen UI 是一款轻量级 Vue.js UI 组件库，遵循 Google Material Design 设计规范，提供简洁的 API 和丰富的交互组件。它不依赖 CSS 框架，专注于 JavaScript 驱动的可复用组件，支持 Vue 3，并允许灵活的主题定制与独立组件引入。
summary.en: Keen UI is a lightweight Vue.js UI component library inspired by Google's Material Design, offering a simple API and interactive components. It focuses on JavaScript-driven elements without bundling CSS frameworks, supports Vue 3, and enables theme customization and standalone component usage.

metadata.name: element
metadata.description: A Vue.js 2.0 UI Toolkit for Web

summary.zh: Element 是一个基于 Vue.js 2.0 的现代化 Web UI 组件库，提供丰富的桌面端组件，适用于快速构建企业级中后台系统。支持主题定制、多语言，并拥有完善的文档和社区生态。
summary.en: Element is a Vue.js 2.0-based UI toolkit offering a rich set of desktop components for building enterprise-grade web applications. It supports theme customization, internationalization, and has comprehensive documentation and strong community support.

metadata.name: vue-strap
metadata.description: Bootstrap components built with Vue.js

summary.zh: vue-strap 是一个基于 Vue.js 构建的 Bootstrap 组件库，提供无需 jQuery 和 Bootstrap JS 的原生 Vue 组件。该项目已不再维护，推荐使用 bootstrap-vue 或 uiv 替代。支持 Vue 1.x 和 Bootstrap 3.x，可通过 NPM、CommonJS、ES6、AMD 或浏览器全局变量引入。
summary.en: vue-strap is a set of native Vue.js components based on Bootstrap's markup and CSS, eliminating dependencies on jQuery or Bootstrap's JavaScript. It is no longer maintained, with bootstrap-vue and uiv recommended as alternatives. Compatible with Vue 1.x and Bootstrap 3.x, it supports multiple module systems including NPM, ES6, and browser globals.

metadata.name: vux
metadata.description: Mobile UI Components based on Vue & WeUI

summary.zh: Vux 是一个基于 Vue 2.3+ 和 WeUI 的移动端 UI 组件库，提供丰富的移动端交互组件，适用于快速构建微信小程序风格的 Web 应用。支持 Webpack 构建，具备良好的文档和模板支持，适合 Vue 开发者进行移动端开发。
summary.en: Vux is a mobile UI component library built on Vue 2.3+ and WeUI, offering a rich set of mobile interaction components for rapidly developing WeChat Mini Program-style web apps. It supports Webpack, includes comprehensive documentation and templates, and is ideal for Vue developers building mobile applications.

metadata.name: django-cors-headers
metadata.description: Django app for handling the server headers required for Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS)

summary.zh: django-cors-headers 是一个用于在 Django 应用中添加跨域资源共享（CORS）响应头的工具，支持从其他域名安全访问资源。它通过中间件自动处理 CORS 头部，兼容 Django 4.2–6.0 和 Python 3.10–3.14，配置简单，广泛用于前后端分离架构中解决跨域请求问题。
summary.en: django-cors-headers is a Django app that adds Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) headers to responses, enabling secure cross-domain requests. It uses middleware to automatically inject headers, supports Django 4.2–6.0 and Python 3.10–3.14, and is widely used in frontend-backend separated architectures.

metadata.name: tabula
metadata.description: Tabula is a tool for liberating data tables trapped inside PDF files

summary.zh: Tabula 是一款用于从文本型 PDF 文件中提取表格数据的开源工具，支持将数据导出为 CSV 格式。它提供本地运行的 Web 界面，无需联网即可处理文件，保障数据隐私。项目基于 Java 开发，核心提取功能由 tabula-java 库实现，目前主应用维护较少，但底层库仍偶有更新。
summary.en: Tabula is an open-source tool for extracting tables from text-based PDFs into CSV format. It features a local web interface that processes files offline, ensuring data privacy. Built on Java, its core extraction engine is powered by the tabula-java library, which continues to receive occasional updates despite limited maintenance of the main application.

metadata.name: hexo-theme-diaspora
metadata.description: Hexo theme, Blog theme, Clean, Responsive theme

summary.zh: Hexo-theme-diaspora 是一款移植自 WordPress 的清新响应式博客主题，专为摄影、影评、乐评及文字爱好者设计。支持 Ajax 加载、本地搜索、音乐播放、分类标签页及 Gitalk 评论，配置灵活，界面简洁现代，适合打造个性化内容展示站点。
summary.en: Hexo-theme-diaspora is a clean, responsive blog theme ported from WordPress, ideal for photographers, critics, and writers. It features Ajax loading, local search, music playback, category/tag pages, and Gitalk comments, offering a modern and customizable experience for personal content sites.

metadata.name: hexo-theme-Daily
metadata.description: A simple theme for Hexo

summary.zh: hexo-theme-Daily 是一款简洁优雅的 Hexo 主题，专为 Hexo 4.x 设计，提供清晰的博客展示界面。支持 IE9+ 浏览器，内置 Sass 渲染依赖，安装简单，适合追求简约风格的内容创作者使用。灵感源自 WordPress Daily 主题。
summary.en: hexo-theme-Daily is a clean and elegant theme for Hexo 4.x, offering a minimalist blog layout with IE9+ browser support. It requires hexo-renderer-sass and is easy to install, ideal for content creators seeking simplicity. Inspired by the WordPress Daily theme.

metadata.name: markcook
metadata.description: A smart and beautiful markdown editor.

summary.zh: Markcook 是一款基于 Vue.js 2.0 和 Vuex 2.0 构建的智能美观 Markdown 编辑器，采用 Google Material Design 设计语言。支持多文件编辑、拖拽加载、自动本地存储、一键导出为 Markdown 或 HTML 文件，提供流畅的动画与低对比度护眼界面，兼具在线使用与类本地应用的体验。
summary.en: Markcook is a smart and elegant Markdown editor built with Vue.js 2.0 and Vuex 2.0, featuring Google Material Design. It supports multi-file editing, drag-and-drop loading, auto-save to local storage, and export to Markdown or HTML. With smooth animations and eye-friendly low-contrast UI, it delivers a near-native experience in the browser.

metadata.name: deepin-terminal
metadata.description: Deepin Terminal written by vala

summary.zh: Deepin Terminal 是深度操作系统默认的终端模拟器，采用 Vala 语言开发，基于 GTK3 构建。支持多工作区、分屏、快捷键操作、主题定制及远程管理等功能，提供流畅的 Linux 终端体验，深度集成 deepin 桌面环境。
summary.en: Deepin Terminal is the default terminal emulator for the Deepin OS, built with Vala and GTK3. It features multi-workspace support, split views, customizable shortcuts, theme options, and remote management, offering a seamless terminal experience tightly integrated with the Deepin desktop environment.

metadata.name: awesome-python-books
metadata.description: 如果有人让你推荐 Python 技术书，请让他看这个列表

summary.zh: 该仓库是一个精选的Python技术书籍推荐列表，涵盖入门到进阶多个层次，由社区投票和豆瓣评分共同筛选，包含《集体智慧编程》《利用Python进行数据分析》等高分经典，适合不同阶段开发者系统学习Python编程与实战应用。
summary.en: This repo curates a community-voted list of top Python books, ranging from beginner to advanced levels, featuring highly-rated titles like 'Collective Intelligence' and 'Python for Data Analysis', ideal for systematic learning and practical application in Python development.

metadata.name: ColorfulNews
metadata.description: A news-reading App (MVP+Dagger2+RxJava+Retrofit2+Material Design)

summary.zh: ColorfulNews 是一款基于 Material Design 风格的新闻阅读应用，采用 MVP 架构模式，集成 Dagger2、RxJava 和 Retrofit2 实现依赖注入与响应式网络请求，支持图文浏览与频道切换，界面简洁流畅，适合 Android 开发者学习现代架构与 UI 设计。
summary.en: ColorfulNews is a Material Design-based news reading app built with MVP architecture, utilizing Dagger2 for dependency injection, RxJava for reactive programming, and Retrofit2 for network requests. It features clean UI, image/text browsing, and channel switching, serving as a practical example for Android developers.

metadata.name: pickadate.js
metadata.description: The mobile-friendly, responsive, and lightweight jQuery date & time input picker.

summary.zh: pickadate.js 是一款轻量级、响应式且兼容移动端的 jQuery 日期与时间选择器插件。支持多语言（43种）、RTL 布局，提供默认和经典两种主题，使用 LESS 构建样式，可通过 Grunt 构建和定制。适用于需要优雅日期输入的 Web 应用。
summary.en: pickadate.js is a lightweight, responsive, and mobile-friendly jQuery date and time picker. It supports 43 languages, RTL layouts, and offers two themes (default and classic). Built with LESS and Grunt, it allows deep customization of styles and behavior for modern web forms.

metadata.name: mobi.css
metadata.description: A lightweight, scalable, mobile-first CSS framework

summary.zh: Mobi.css 是一个轻量、可扩展、移动优先的 CSS 框架，默认包仅 3KB（gzip 后），适合快速构建简洁优雅的网页。其插件系统支持灵活扩展，可独立使用插件，专为内容丰富的移动端页面优化，同时兼容桌面端。
summary.en: Mobi.css is a lightweight, scalable, mobile-first CSS framework with a default bundle of only 3KB (gzipped). It enables rapid development of clean, elegant webpages, supports extensible plugins that can be used independently, and is optimized for content-rich mobile experiences while remaining desktop-friendly.

metadata.name: ant-design-mobile
metadata.description: Essential UI blocks for building mobile web apps.

summary.zh: Ant Design Mobile 是专为移动端 Web 应用设计的 UI 组件库，提供高性能、可定制的原子化组件。基于 CSS 变量支持主题定制，具备流畅手势与细腻动画，开箱即用，适用于快速构建高质量的移动 Web 界面。
summary.en: Ant Design Mobile is a UI component library designed for mobile web apps, offering high-performance, customizable atomic components. Built with CSS variables for theming, it delivers smooth gestures and refined animations, enabling rapid development of premium mobile web interfaces.

metadata.name: bootstrap-tokenfield
metadata.description: A jQuery tag/token input plugin for Twitter's Bootstrap, by the guys from Sliptree

summary.zh: Bootstrap Tokenfield 是一个基于 jQuery 和 Twitter Bootstrap 的标签输入插件，支持键盘操作、复制粘贴、自动补全及防重复校验。适用于需要多标签输入的表单场景，如标签系统、用户选择等。项目已停止维护，但仍可作为轻量级前端组件使用。
summary.en: Bootstrap Tokenfield is a jQuery-based tagging input plugin for Twitter Bootstrap, supporting keyboard navigation, copy-paste, autocomplete, and duplicate prevention. Ideal for multi-tag input forms like tagging systems or user selection. The project is no longer maintained but remains usable as a lightweight frontend component.

metadata.name: data_location
metadata.description: 中华人民共和国行政区划数据【省、市、区县、乡镇街道】中国省市区镇三级四级联动地址数据（GB/T 2260）

summary.zh: 该项目提供中华人民共和国省、市、区县、乡镇街道四级行政区划权威数据，遵循GB/T 2260国家标准，涵盖最新至2025年11月的街道级信息。数据来源包括民政部、国务院及国家统计局，支持三级联动选择组件与身份证解析工具，适用于地址选择、表单填写等Web应用场景。
summary.en: This repository offers authoritative administrative division data for China at provincial, city, county, and township levels, compliant with GB/T 2260 standard. It includes up-to-date street-level data (as of Nov 2025), sourced from the Ministry of Civil Affairs and National Bureau of Statistics, and supports web components for cascading region selection and ID card parsing.

metadata.name: django-redis
metadata.description: Full featured redis cache backend for Django.

summary.zh: django-redis 是一个功能完整的 Redis 缓存与 Session 后端，专为 Django 框架设计。支持原生 redis-py 连接字符串、可插拔客户端与序列化器、主从架构、无限超时及 Unix 套接字，具备高可配置性和生产级稳定性，适用于高性能 Web 应用缓存与会话管理。
summary.en: django-redis is a full-featured Redis cache and session backend for Django. It supports native redis-py connection URLs, pluggable clients/serializers, primary/secondary setups, infinite timeouts, Unix sockets, and high configurability, making it ideal for production-grade caching and session storage in Django applications.

metadata.name: django-sslserver
metadata.description: A SSL-enabled development server for Django

summary.zh: Django SSL Server 是一个为 Django 框架提供 SSL 支持的本地开发服务器，允许开发者在本地通过 HTTPS 协议调试应用。它内置自签名证书，支持自定义证书和 IPv6，适用于需要模拟生产环境 HTTPS 行为的开发场景，但不应用于生产部署。
summary.en: Django SSL Server is a development server with SSL support for Django, enabling local HTTPS testing. It includes a self-signed certificate by default, supports custom certificates and IPv6, and is ideal for development environments requiring secure connections, though not suitable for production use.

metadata.name: toilet
metadata.description: Urban governance - Where is the restroom?

summary.zh: 该项目是一款基于高德地图API的便民App，帮助用户快速定位附近2公里内的公共卫生间，并提供导航、天气及文章阅读功能。服务端采用Node.js部署于阿里云，结合七牛云存储与微信公众号内容管理，实现轻量级城市服务应用，适合小型App快速开发参考。
summary.en: This project is a convenience app using Gaode Maps API to help users locate public restrooms within 2km, with navigation, weather info, and article reading.
